name: Prince Waikiki
facilities: Guest education on local ecosystems and culture
description: Luxury Hotel Near Ala Moana and Waikiki Beaches Delicious Dining Options and Modern Amenities Indulge in traditional Hawaiian cuisine, authentic Japanese dishes, and international favorites at the on-site dining venues. Relax and rejuvenate at the full-service spa, and take advantage of the fitness center for a workout session. Convenient Location and Nearby Attractions Explore the Hawaii Convention Center, Ala Moana Beach Park, and various recreational activities just a stone's throw away. The hotel's activity desk can assist in planning your adventures, ensuring you make the most of your stay. Relaxing Spaces and Business Facilities Unwind in The Library or find a quiet spot to catch up on
importantInfo: Breakfast rates include breakfast for 2 people only.Guests are required to show a photo ID and credit card upon check-in. Please note that all Special Requests are subject to availability and additional charges may apply. Please inform of your expected arrival time in advance. You can use the Special Requests box when booking, or contact the property directly using the contact details in your confirmation. Guests under the age of 18 can only check in with a parent or official guardian. A deposit may be required at the property.

policies.name: Children and extra bed policy
policies.description: Children of any age are allowed. Children up to and including 2 years old stay for free when using an available cot. People no matter the age stay for US$85 per person per night when using an available extra bed. Any type of extra bed or child's cot/crib is upon request and needs to be confirmed by management. Supplements are not calculated automatically in the total costs and will have to be paid for separately during your stay.

reviews.name: Joyce
reviews.headline: Overall, we enjoyed our short overnight stay.
reviews.pros: The room was spacious with all the necessary amenities, and the ocean view from our 21st floor room was awesomely beautiful. We watched the sun setting while sipping on the complimentary champagne that was delivered to our room to celebrate our 50th wedding anniversary; and later, we watched the…
reviews.cons: Although we enjoyed the food at the 100 Sails Restaurant, we were disappointed with the casual ambience of this high-end hotel. For example, no tablecloth, and although it was a buffet style dinner, the wait staff was almost invisible in our area. Also, for our overnight stay, we were charged $50…

reviews.name: Susan
reviews.headline: Overall, a beautiful property with the amenities we desired! We would stay there again upon visiting Waikīkī
reviews.pros: Beautiful, comfortable rooms and view. Love the bathroom layout for multi-use. Thoroughly enjoyed the convenience of Club Level dining. There was a nice daily selection with attentive concierge. Valets were exceptional especially Hermie! Remembered is and greeted us by name daily. Enjoyed the…
reviews.cons: Room level hallways were hot and stuffy. Issues with elevators not working at times. Had 4 people in the room and needed to reach out with to housekeeping with reminders to bring 4 sets of towels. Housekeeping kept turning up the temperature in the room from what we set it at. Workers noisily…

reviews.name: Xueyan
reviews.headline: Good value.
reviews.pros: Modern, good view, spacious, close to the shopping mall, nice sushi restaurant. I spent good amount of time within the hotel, so it is quite relax.
reviews.cons: It is not very close to Waikiki beach, however there are other beaches nearby. Elevator is a little bit old.

reviews.name: Conrad
reviews.pros: View and location
reviews.cons: Very noisy at the harbour

reviews.name: Shalysse
reviews.headline: Great stay right outside Waikiki
reviews.pros: Everyone was kind and helpful. The restaurants were great, the location was awesome.
reviews.cons: N/A

reviews.name: Michael
reviews.headline: A beautiful place to stay with an amazing staff. Very close to Ala Moana Mall and beaches.
reviews.pros: The staff were incredible and the view from the room was amazing. The hotel staff carry the aloha spirit with pride.

name: Queen Kapiolani Hotel
description: Panoramic Views and Spacious Rooms: Queen Kapiolani Hotel offers stunning panoramic views of Diamond Head from its outdoor pool and sun terrace. The spacious rooms are elegantly decorated and equipped with modern amenities like a 49-inch flat-screen TV and a refrigerator. Convenient Amenities and Services: Enjoy the convenience of beach towels, beach chairs, WiFi, and access to a business center during your stay. The hotel also provides local and toll-free calls, as well as an in-room security deposit box for your peace of mind. Prime Location for Exploration: Located just 1 block from Waikiki Beach, Queen Kapiolani Hotel is the perfect base for exploring Honolulu. With Honolulu Zoo and Kapi
importantInfo: The hotel fee is charged by the property at check-in. The fee includes the following amenities: -Welcome sample drink whip at Aloha Whip (pineapple juice or Dole) -Weekly entertainment and discounted on-property guest activities -Yoga On-The-Go (carrying bag, mat, jump rope, foam roller, fitness cables) -24-Hour fitness center access and discounted yoga classes -Daily surf demonstrations (Hans Surf School) -In-room Chromecast streaming device -High-speed WiFi -24-Hour business center access -Guest printing services (print from laptop or smart device to the business center printer) -Beach chairs, beach towels and sunscreen (sample in-room & dispenser at pool) -Ice and water stations -Complimentary QK postcards -In-room digital safe and refrigerator -Unlimited local and 1-800 calls An incidental deposit via credit card is required at check-in and refundable at check-out less any incidental charges incurred during your stay.Guests are required to show a photo ID and credit card upon check-in. Please note that all Special Requests are subject to availability and additional charges may apply. A deposit may be required at the property.

reviews.name: Loretta
reviews.headline: Never again!
reviews.pros: The baggage person was personable and efficient.
reviews.cons: The desk clerks were unfriendly and failed to provide a decent room when asked to change it. The bed and furniture are old and coming apart. Who wants to pay hundreds of dollars to vacation in a room where furniture is coming apart and dingy.

reviews.name: Milos
reviews.headline: Location
reviews.pros: Positive about this hotel is the location just short walk to the beach, few minutes. Its relatively quiet away from main Waikiki strip but still close enough to go the restaurant or bar. You can also rent beach chairs and towels for free they have small pool. We enjoyed our time and wouldnt mind to…
reviews.cons: All hotels in Waikiki are overpriced and old just trying to preserve whats left from good old days. Parking for $60/night is no fun.

reviews.name: MaryAnn
reviews.headline: Such a great experience
reviews.pros: The staff was very friendly and helpful. The location was perfect, we had the view of the ocean and literally could walk to the beach.
reviews.cons: I wish it would have included breakfast with our stay

reviews.name: Susan
reviews.headline: Great hotel and wonderful staff.
reviews.pros: The staff was very friendly and helpful. The room was very clean and well appointed. The hotel was very close to the beach and the pool deck was a nice retreat and well staffed. I would definitely recommend this property and would stay here again.
reviews.cons: The only complaint would be the the loud truck noise (lots of beeping) on the street below our room. But that is not the fault of the hotel and I would think all hotels in that vicinity would be impacted.

reviews.name: Angel
reviews.pros: The service was impeccable. The staff was wonderful. The location was perfect. The view from my room was marvelous. The birthday champagne was a grand surprise. So grateful for everything!
reviews.cons: No microwaves. I understand why, though.

reviews.name: Katherine
reviews.headline: Clean. Beautiful. Noisy.
reviews.pros: Excellent location! Immaculately clean!!! Amazing staff and perfect amenities.
reviews.cons: We were on the top floor and the across from the elevator lobby- there was constant noise from the movement of the elevator. All hours of the night whenever any of the 3 elevators moved there was an initial loud thump accompanied by 2-3 more when the elevator stopped. If you’re someone who is a…

reviews.name: Thanh Thuy
reviews.headline: This hotel is modern and comfortable and located in a great park of Waikiki for ease of access to beach, shopping, and d
reviews.pros: Location was great for exploring Waikiki. The hotel is modern and clean. I also enjoyed the pool and gym.
reviews.cons: The layout of the hotel was kind of strange.

reviews.name: Tony Bishop
reviews.headline: Location and comfort
reviews.pros: Location is good and room was comfortable with a good view out to sea. The room was quiet
reviews.cons: No bathroom amenities like body lotion or shower cap.

name: Halekulani - NO RESORT FEE
facilities: Guest education on local ecosystems and culture
description: Luxurious Accommodations Experience luxury at its finest at Halekulani hotel. Each guest room features a spacious lanai, en suite bathroom with premium toiletries, and a flat-screen TV. A warm welcome awaits you with a fresh fruit bowl and signature chocolates in every room. Culinary Delights Indulge in a culinary journey at our three restaurants. From fine French cuisine at La Mer, seafood specialties at Orchids, to casual oceanfront dining at A House Without a Key, there is something to satisfy every palate. Enjoy sumptuous Sunday brunch and nightly entertainment in a picturesque setting. Relaxation and Recreation Unwind at Spa Halekulani with traditional Polynesian treatments or take a di
chain: The Leading Hotels of the World
importantInfo: Hotel’s SpaHalekulani & Premier Suite modernization project will take place from January 8, 2024, to the end of April 2024. As the safety and comfort of our guests are our top priority, we will do our best to minimize any inconvenience. Please know that the hotel will remain open, and we will be offering our full range of services, including spa treatments throughout the dates of the project. Work will take place on weekdays (Monday through Friday from 9:00am to 5:00pm) and will be limited to a designated area of the hotel.Guests are required to show a photo ID and credit card upon check-in. Please note that all Special Requests are subject to availability and additional charges may apply. Please inform of your expected arrival time in advance. With Honolulu International Airport a short drive away, your dream vacation awaits at OUTRIGGER Waikiki Be

Modern Amenities Each room is equipped with a split air conditioning unit, a 42-inch or larger LED TV, blackout drapes, walnut hardwood flooring, free toiletries, and a hairdryer. Enjoy free high-speed WiFi throughout the property for your convenience. Convenient Location Located near King Kalakaua and Fort DeRussy parks, Luxury Row, and Fort DeRussy Beach Park, Hotel La Croix provides easy access to some of Waikiki's most popular attractions. Experience luxury and comfort at Hotel La Croix - book your stay now for an unforgettable experience.

reviews.name: Ross
reviews.headline: 5 star stay at a true 5 star hotel
reviews.pros: The hotel has a lot of classic charm and is positioned on a beautiful stretch of beach. The staff are incredibly friendly, the rooms are spacious and exceptionally clean. We had a top floor oceanfront room and the view was, as you can imagine, beautiful. The spa was also top tier.
reviews.cons: The pool area is small and quite busy. There’s no adults-only pool so be prepared for splashing from kids doing cannonballs and similar activities.

reviews.name: Francesca
reviews.headline: AMAZING, would live here if possible!
reviews.pros: Attention to detail, friendly staff makes you feel like family. Amazing location, room was fantastic and the beach is beautiful. Peaceful tranquility.
reviews.cons: Nothing it was all up to par. From when you enter through the valet to when you check-in, the pool guys. Everyone is so friendly there is nothing to not like.

reviews.name: Chris
reviews.headline: We were glad to stay here
reviews.pros: Very quiet property away from downtown . Dolphins amazing
reviews.cons: There should be warning signs on the beach of potential water contamination from the prior storm runoff . I got sick 2 days later from accidentally swallowing the saltwater

reviews.name: Lance
reviews.headline: Convenient enough, a little dated, small pool, would be nice to have an adult only pool.
reviews.pros: The beach location
reviews.cons: Not much around the hotel directly

reviews.name: Fiona
reviews.headline: Beautiful and unforgettable
reviews.pros: Very stylish Hotel, the rooms were exceptional and great location not far from Waikiki
reviews.cons: The Restaurant was quite basic, where Breakfast was served. Expensive for what we ordered.

reviews.name: VijiS78
reviews.headline: EXcellent, highly recommend it
reviews.pros: Leslie was great, it was special day for me and it made is very especially by giving a great massage and facial. She knew all the sore areas and worked on them. I felt totally relaxed after the massage. She was great!

reviews.name: Stewart
reviews.headline: Nice stay, but overall we were left a little underwhelmed for the price of the stay
reviews.pros: Location was perfect. We had a high room, & the view was incredible. Staff were very friendly and helpful.
reviews.cons: Room was basic, with few amenities. Bathroom is tiny, with no fan or windows. Pool area was nice, but too busy for us to use a sunbed at all times. The pool & bar was closed for a whole day for a private event, which was disappointing.

reviews.name: Paige
reviews.headline: Nice
reviews.pros: Great location & friendly staff. Breakfast and swell bar was nice
reviews.cons: Rooms were average and quite noisy. Wouldn’t bother paying extra for the view unless it is oceanfront. We had ocean view but would say it was partial and obstructed by lots

reviews.name: Mahyar
reviews.headline: Big shame, right place. Wrong management.
reviews.pros: Location and reception staff, specifically Tamara who was very caring.
reviews.cons: All diamond head view106 infinity pool152 ocean view127 beach access129 +6 Sort by Most relevant Newest Highest Lowest ￼ Mahyar Mortazavi Local Guide·102 reviews·36 photos Vacation | Couple This could be an amazing hotel based on its location and its design, HOWEVER, it has the most unprofessional…

reviews.name: Sela
reviews.pros: Longboard Club and location to the beach.
reviews.cons: Can be a bit noisy from the activities outside.

reviews.name: Phillip
reviews.headline: Made our week
reviews.pros: Swell pool and bar was amazing, great service and facility, very clean and classy building
reviews.cons: Spa/massage prices were a bit high but a very pleasant experience

reviews.name: Felix
reviews.headline: Great place!
reviews.pros: Beautiful hotel and location, great service
reviews.cons: Pool was very often closed for private events, bar not accessible.

name: Waikiki Malia
facilities: Staff adhere to local safety protocols
Cleaning standards that are effective against Coronavirus
Guests can opt-out any cleaning services during stay
description: Luxurious Amenities and Convenient Location Indulge in the outdoor pool, hot tub, and proximity to upscale shopping and the famous Waikiki Beach. Each suite is equipped with modern conveniences and a kitchenette for a comfortable stay. Exceptional Services Enjoy bell service, 24-hour reception, and a fitness center during your stay. Take advantage of dry cleaning services and savor classic American breakfast at the International House of Pancakes. Vibrant Dining and Entertainment Options Experience a Las Vegas style atmosphere at Rivals Waikiki sports bar with 14 flat-screen TVs. Unwind at the bar and lounge after exploring nearby attractions like the Waikiki Aquarium. Book now for an unforg
importantInfo: If traveling with children, please indicate the ages of each child in the special requests comment field when making reservations. Daily resort fee (Amenity Fee) inclusions: Two (2) bottles of water in reusable bottles on arrival date, High-speed WiFi Local and international phone calls (up to 15 mins) Access to the fitness center Use of beach towels Access to the pool and hot tub Onsite guest activities Discounts at International Market Place and Duty Free Waikiki Complimentary daily coffee service at the lobby. Please note: fee is subject to change without notice.Guests are required to show a photo ID and credit card upon check-in. Please note that all Special Requests are subject to availability and additional charges may apply. A deposit may be required at the property.

policies.name: Pets
policies.description: Pets are allowed on request. Charges may be applicable.

policies.name: Internet
policies.description: WiFi is available in all areas and charges are applicable.

policies.name: Groups
policies.description: When booking more than 9 rooms, different policies and additional supplements may apply.

policies.name: Parking
policies.description: Public parking is possible on site (reservation is not needed) and costs USD 40 per day.

policies.name: Children and extra bed policy
policies.description: Children of any age are allowed. Children up to and including 2 years old stay for free when using an available cot. Children up to and including 17 years old stay for free when using an existing bed. People no matter the age stay for US$45 per person per night when using an available extra bed. Any type of extra bed or child's cot/crib is upon request and needs to be confirmed by management. Supplements are not calculated automatically in the total costs and will have to be paid for separately during your stay.

reviews.name: Sofia
reviews.headline: The hotel gave me a staph infection.
reviews.pros: The hotel is in a great location. Really makes you walk and get in all your steps but outside of the crazy of the main strip. The hotel provided free water and free coffee which was super nice and saved us money. The staff are all lovely and super pleasant.
reviews.cons: The hotel does the job. Decent place to stay. However the hotel is not that clean and also gave me a staph infection (skin infection) that I had to treat with antibiotics. The carpet in the room is extremely dirty bring slides for the hotel. The towels all smelt a bit gross. The hotel lifts are…

reviews.name: Samuel
reviews.pros: Everything
reviews.cons: Nothing

reviews.name: Nour
reviews.headline: Never again
reviews.pros: Renovated, good location
reviews.cons: Very noisy, you can hear all your neighbours

reviews.name: dorit
reviews.headline: Pleasant stay.
reviews.pros: Location
reviews.cons: It is a bit run down, compared to other hotels in the area.

reviews.name: Gil
reviews.headline: Decent hotel but not for a romantic Hawaiian vacation
reviews.pros: The location is very good. Walking distance to beach and right next to the tourist center. The staff was very good. The room was clean.
reviews.cons: This is not the place for your dreamy romantic Hawaiian vacation. The double beds (2 double bed room) were narrow. The washroom was extremely small and crowded. It also was very run down. The pool was very disappointing.

name: Embassy Suites by Hilton Waikiki Beach Walk
facilities: Staff adhere to local safety protocols
Cleaning standards that are effective against Coronavirus
Hand sanitizer in guest room and key areas
Guests can opt-out any cleaning services during stay
Shared stationery like menus, pens are removed
description: Luxurious Suites with Spectacular Views At Embassy Suites by Hilton Waikiki Beach Walk, experience the perfect blend of comfort and luxury just moments away from the vibrant Waikiki Beach. Indulge in spacious suites with kitchenettes, city or ocean views, and a private balcony for a truly unforgettable stay. Relaxation and Entertainment Unwind at the open-air Grand Lanai featuring a heated pool, hot tub, and children's pool. Sip on cocktails from the Pakini Bar while enjoying live Hawaiian entertainment. The ideal spot to bask in the sun and soak in the tropical paradise. Convenience at Your Fingertips Enjoy a complimentary full cook-to-order breakfast, fitness center, and business facilitie
importantInfo: Resort charge bundles include the following: 1. Guest internet access 2. Exercise and Cultural activities 3. Beach Towels 4. In-room tea kettle 5. Discounts at select Waikiki Restaurants and Shopping 6. Discounts for poolside cabanas and daybeds 7. Complimentary dessert at Ruth’s Chris with purchase of entrée 8. Complimentary youth entrance per paid adult at Waikiki Aquarium and Bishop Museum 9. Press ReaderGuests are required to show a photo ID and credit card upon check-in. Please note that all Special Requests are subject to availability and additional charges may apply. A deposit may be required at the property.

reviews.name: Jennifer
reviews.headline: Excellent location, excellent service.
reviews.pros: Location is close almost everything from groceries, restaurants, shopping stores, beach, Main Street, etc. value price with excellent accommodation.
reviews.cons: Nothing

reviews.name: Rachel
reviews.headline: It was just ok, I expected more out of Hilton.
reviews.pros: Close proximity to lots of things, does include breakfast, staff was friendly, provided a water refill station
reviews.cons: Beds were uncomfortable, water never got hot in the shower it was lukewarm at best, shower towels were thin, power went out and stayed out for what felt like a couple of minutes before coming back on

reviews.name: Andrea
reviews.headline: Would definitely consider a return stay st
reviews.pros: Our room was clean and comfortable and the breakfast buffet was excellent lots of options, the workers in the dining area were very friendly and helpful and courteous, location was very close to everything in the downtown area.
reviews.cons: The ice machine was broken on my floor, but the breakfast was awesome

reviews.name: Lisa
reviews.headline: Great fun other than the soap dispenser issue
reviews.pros: Location Kamaina rate parking (50% off) Free breakfast and afternoon drinks/snacks
reviews.cons: We had a 2 bedroom suite with 2 bathrooms. Both showers were missing body soap dispensers. We had to pump soap from the sink to use in our showers. We had friends in another room who also said 1 of 2 bathrooms in their unit had missing body soap dispenser. For this inconvenience, I deducted my…

reviews.name: Alexandra
reviews.headline: It’s my forth time that I have stayed there and absolutely love it
reviews.pros: The location was excellent
reviews.cons: A little expensive

reviews.name: Kira
reviews.pros: The friendly staff, the food options were great and the location was superb. Plus the little touch of free beverages at happy hour was an added bonus, nice touch 👌
reviews.cons: The lifts were a little slow but manageable.

description: Stunning Views and Rooftop Pool Located across from Waikiki Beach, our 100% non-smoking hotel offers breathtaking views of Diamond Head and the Pacific Ocean. Relax and unwind at our rooftop swimming pool and sun terrace, both boasting panoramic ocean views. Diverse Dining Options Indulge in authentic Japanese cuisine at Yoshitsune or savor Island and Asian-American dishes at LuLu's Waikiki, right on the beach. For a quick bite, our on-site restaurant offers casual fare and gourmet picnic options. Excursions and Wellness Plan your adventures with ease at our activities desk, or stay active with fitness and yoga classes. Treat yourself to a rejuvenating massage. Adjacent to Kapiolani Park and
importantInfo: The resort fee includes: - Complimentary high-speed internet - Hawaiian coffee in guestrooms - Sunscreen located poolside - Unlimited local and long-distance calls - Use of towels - Use of beach Candy: unique ocean floats - After sun lotions located poolside *Resort fee and inclusions subject to availability and may change at any time without notice Park Shore Waikiki is committed to providing its guests and associates with a smoke free environment. Smoking tobacco, pipes, vapes, e-cigarettes and marijuana is strictly prohibited within the hotel. By booking through this website, you acknowledge that the hotel has installed smoking detection sensors in its rooms. These sensors enable hotel management to respond to smoking events without disrupting your stay. You hereby agree and consent to the use of such sensor in your room and acknowledge and agree that it is 100% privacy compliant and required by the hotel to ensure a smoke-free stay for all guests. By acknowledging the foregoing, you agree to waive any future claims related to the presence of the sensor in a room you may book. Tampering with the sensor is strictly prohibited.Guests are required to show a photo ID and credit card

reviews.name: faithaZ9989PD
reviews.headline: Beach yoga
reviews.pros: Morning yoga on the beach was a beautiful way to start the day! Paige was great!

reviews.name: heathercZ3637DX
reviews.headline: Sunrise Beach Yoga
reviews.pros: The yoga classes provided here are outstanding! Paige was incredible. She was able to teach her class based on everyone’s experience level. She was pleasant and knowledgeable. I really enjoyed my practice on the beach. Both Julia and Paige are excellent! I’ll be back to take their classes!

reviews.name: namastemamala
reviews.headline: Exceptional!
reviews.pros: Wonderful experience! Hotel location and staff were amazing! Best Mai Tai and best Loco Moco at LuLu's restaurant located in hotel! Right next to Diamond Head and quiter side of Waikiki.

reviews.name: 893ajdag
reviews.headline: Amazing morning beach yoga with Paige
reviews.pros: Paige was amazing, the best possible to wake up with a beach yoga with the sounds of the waves and stretching out your body to start the day. Highly recommend!

reviews.name: marneyl2026
reviews.headline: A must-do experience
reviews.pros: Great experience! Julia is outstanding. So glad I got up early to go. I’ll probably try to go at least one more time while I’m here before the class fills up.

reviews.name: 191dena
reviews.headline: So very helpful and professional!
reviews.pros: It’s awesome. Very good. The staff was phenomenal. Five star. Thank you. Special thank you to guest service manager Jules Davis. She made our stay so personal and enjoyable. Lito with valet was kind and very helpful.

description: Prime Location near Waikiki Beach Located just a short stroll away from the famous Waikiki Beach, our Honolulu hotel offers the perfect tropical getaway. Convenient Amenities and Dining Options Enjoy comfortable guest rooms equipped with modern amenities such as free WiFi, a TV, and a refrigerator. Indulge in 24-hour dining options including appetizers, entrees, and a variety of to-go items at the 24/7 Gallery Market. Relaxation and Recreation Unwind by the swimming pool or on the sun terrace while soaking in the Hawaiian sun. Stay active at the fitness centre or explore the area with the assistance of our concierge service. Book your stay at Hyatt Place Waikiki now for a memorable Hawaiian
importantInfo: The Hyatt Place Waikiki Beach offers the following amenities included in our daily resort fee to enhance your stay: - Hyatt Place Logo Tote Bag with 2 bottles of water - Activity discounts - Access to Beach Chairs & Toys (up to 2 per room, day rental, based on availability) - Unlimited local & toll-free calls - Discounted flat rate on airport transportation to/from Honolulu International Airport (maximum party of 5, one way, tax inclusive contact hotel for more details) - Daily food & beverage credit at the gallery kitchen (not cumulative) - Use of body and boogie boards (based on availability) - Coffee served every morning in the lobby. Please contact property for credit card authorization form for 3rd party reservations. Valet parking is available. Please contact hotel about valet charges per day. Additional fee for valet parking for oversize vehicle applies.Guests are required to show a photo ID and credit card upon check-in. Please note that all Special Requests are subject to availability and additional charges may apply. Parking is subject to availability due to limited spaces. A deposit may be required at the property.

reviews.name: Leslie
reviews.headline: Mostly great aside from parking situation and cost
reviews.pros: Location
reviews.cons: Valet only option poor service and overpriced

reviews.name: Carol
reviews.headline: Very enjoyable relaxing and will recommend you to my friends. My family and I had a great time.
reviews.pros: Lovely area, close to everything, comfortable and clean.
reviews.cons: Our aircon had a leak, got fixed straight away thank you but when he took the cover off the filter was filthy it hadn’t been cleaned for a while. Too many birds around at breakfast time, maybe invest in some sort of netting that can come out and across and then retract back afterwards.

reviews.name: nestie
reviews.headline: I would stay here again!
reviews.pros: It’s great location. free breakfast buffet. Staff are all nice and accommodating especially the house keeping!!! The only thing I don’t like is waiting for the elevators, that’s about it. I will definitely be back.
reviews.cons: The elevator wait time

reviews.name: Annie
reviews.headline: Great!
reviews.pros: Location
reviews.cons: Everything else about this hotel is perfect other than the destination tax of 42 dollars which has to be charged to each of your room every day for the duration of your stay. We had 4 rooms and we had to pay that damn tax for each room x 8 days plus the cost of the hotel 😞😳🤷‍♀️

reviews.name: Jayson
reviews.headline: Good value! Great breakfast!
reviews.pros: room spacious, clean
reviews.cons: water pressure shower, almost squeaks when pressure down sofa bed mattress is worn, and slopes to the middle of the bed

reviews.name: Rob
reviews.pros: Great location & cleanliness
reviews.cons: Lifts… lifts were very slow in peak times

description: Luxurious Amenities and Services Indulge in the ultimate relaxation at Hyatt Regency Waikiki Beach Resort & Spa with its outdoor pool, hot tub, and Na Ho'ola Spa. Enjoy the convenience of free WiFi and a balcony in every room, along with top-notch amenities like a satellite TV and iPod docking station. Culinary Delights Satisfy your taste buds at Shor Restaurant with a delectable breakfast buffet and later, experience the lavish dinner buffets at "The Buffet at Hyatt" featuring a variety of fresh seafood, sushi, prime rib, and local favorites. Don't miss out on creative cocktails and island-inspired dishes at SWIM, complemented by the lively "Aloha Waikiki" hula show.
importantInfo: Resort Fee includes: · Complimentary unlimited local and 1-800 telephone calls · Complimentary long distance and international calls – up to 60 minutes per day · Resort interactive cultural activities (ukulele lessons, flower lei making, hula lessons) · Access to Pressreader’s 5000 newspapers and magazines in multiple languages · Complimentary use of beach amenities, e.g., Tommy Bahama beach chairs · “Biki” bicycle ride sharing service – onetime credit of USD 4 per person (2 people maximum) · 24 Hour Stay Fit Gym access · Re-usable Hyatt Regency Waikīkī tote bag · Re-usable souvenir Hyatt Regency Waikīkī water bottle with water stations on each floor · Children 5 & under “eat for free” from the Children’s menu with paying adult · Discount coupons from participating Pualeilani Atrium shops, Na Ho’ola Spa and SWIM bar · Complimentary incoming faxes · Chromecast service for in-room television viewing · Premium Wi-Fi in guestrooms and public areas · Complimentary plantation iced tea and fruit infused iced water at check-in · House slippers and personal amenity items pre-set in guest room · In-room coffee and tea · Sunrise yoga and pilates class on the pool deck (twice weekly) · Libatio

reviews.pros: Staff were amazing! Celebrated my birthday and they really went above and beyond to make my stay great! Really pleased we picked this hotel.
reviews.cons: Everything in the room and hotel was absolutely fantastic. If I could say one bad thing- Could do with some shower/changing facilities for guests to use post-checkout as showering on the roof in the open wasn’t too convenient.

reviews.name: Grimes
reviews.headline: Great staff and enjoyed my room!
reviews.pros: Clean and simple!
reviews.cons: Limited parking.

reviews.name: PITOON
reviews.headline: Goog location
reviews.pros: Location in the center of Waikiki and Staff are very helpful And good services Happy to see them again this year Marijoy MJ at Front Desk Also House Keeping Yayie and Mycel
reviews.cons: Room condition need to do renovation , especially carpet in the room and corridor of the hotel Look very old and tired

reviews.name: David
reviews.headline: Love the convenience
reviews.pros: Close to everything
reviews.cons: Small rooms lumpy pillows

description: Luxurious Modern Rooms Experience comfort and style just a block away from Waikiki Beach at Renew. Each room features a 32-inch flat-screen TV, air conditioning, and a private balcony with stunning views. Relax in the seating area or pamper yourself in the en suite bathroom with plush bathrobes and premium amenities. Convenient Amenities Enjoy complimentary newspapers, beach towels, and beach gear during your stay. Everything you need for a perfect beach day is right at your fingertips at Renew. Nearby Attractions Explore the vibrant surroundings with Honolulu Zoo and Ala Wai Golf Course just a short drive away. Don't forget to visit the iconic Diamond Head Crater Park, located a mere 4.3 km
importantInfo: Dogs are permitted to stay at this hotel. Maximum occupancy is 2 dogs per room. Pets can be accommodated at an extra charge of USD 35 per pet, per night. The following services are included in the guest destination program: - WiFi - guests can create miniature bags of local lavender to enhance sleep and get a good night’s rest - Beach gear rental, including beach chairs, towels, boogie boards, umbrellas, and snorkel gear (based on availability) - Surfboard storage - Daily newspaper in lobby - Board games and book library (available on request) - In room workout kits that include: resistance bands, weights, ab rollers, mini Pilates balls, yoga mats and perfect pushup rotating handles (available upon request)Guests are required to show a photo ID and credit card upon check-in. reviews.headline: Ok
reviews.pros: Breakfast was crappy - no options. Crappy rice thing
reviews.cons: Very noisy area late at night

reviews.name: Ken
reviews.headline: Relaxed and comfortable
reviews.pros: Location was excellent. Staff very friendly, polite and professional and willing to assist in any way possible. Rooms were a good size and very clean. Toiletries provided daily (eg, soap, shampoo clean towels). Close to beach, pubs restaurants. Would highly recommend this establishment to anyone…
reviews.cons: Nothing.

reviews.name: Bonnie
reviews.headline: Wonderful!
reviews.pros: Location
reviews.cons: I enjoyed my time at Hotel Renew. I have nothing negative to say.

reviews.name: Anjelica Pascual Cosino
reviews.headline: We had a wonderful time at your hotel and would like to visit again.
reviews.pros: It was great that the hotel was walking distance from the beach and that the hotel provided complimentary beach towels, chairs, and sand toys. The room was nice and fit the needs of our family just fine. I appreciate the effort that the staff made to clean our room of the daily sand that my family…
reviews.cons: We went to the beach daily and it would have been nice if there was a clothes line in the bathroom or extra hangers to hang our wet swimsuits. Parking wasn't the greatest but we anticipated that. It was helpful that the hotel was located within walking distance of the Honolulu Zoo. We were able to…

reviews.name: Susan
reviews.pros: The location was perfect and all the staff were very helpful and friendly.
reviews.cons: The patio door to the balcony was very hard to open.

reviews.name: David
reviews.headline: great location but very outdated,shower curtain had lots of stains,carpet was wet on arrival
reviews.pros: location and size of room
reviews.cons: very outdated decor,lack of cafe/restaurant,could not even get tea

reviews.name: guadalupe
reviews.headline: We love Hawaii and this place is worth coming back to
reviews.pros: The property was a good place to be. It was good walk distance to stores the beach restaurants
reviews.cons: Maybe some of the flies

reviews.name: carrie
reviews.headline: Good value.
reviews.pros: Nice and convenient location. Nice open pool deck and walkway.
reviews.cons: Uncomfortable bed and loud people in room next door

reviews.name: Ash
reviews.pros: Staff friendly and room was spacious and clean.
reviews.cons: The elevators could be heard so waking up in the morning consisted of the sounds of the elevator whirring up and down.

reviews.name: Sandra
reviews.pros: Great large poolside area and fantastic location for lagoon swimming and Ala Moana Shopping centre
reviews.cons: No breakfast option

reviews.name: Brianna
reviews.headline: It was a nice stay for our first time in Hawaii.
reviews.pros: The location was pretty close to a lot of things.
reviews.cons: The area is not the cleanest.

reviews.name: Brad Gragert
reviews.headline: Good location and nice pool
reviews.pros: The room was good size, and the bed was good. Needed a bit of updating. Location was good. Close to the beach, and there was a great bar accross the street that sold good food and cheap drinks.
reviews.cons: Hotel seemed dark and dated.

reviews.name: Anne
reviews.headline: Great spot, wonderful views from our room and a comfortable stay
reviews.pros: Our first time to Hawaii and such a great location for us - close to the beach, shops but also not too busy like further along Waikiki. The room was good, loved the view and nothing was outstanding but we were not expecting that for the price (compared with other seafront hotels). It was great to…
reviews.cons: Check in took some tme due to the queues, but perhaps to be expected with so many rooms!

reviews.name: stlfamilyrobinson
reviews.headline: Would stay again!
reviews.pros: A 5Star stay for myself (F62 and sister F55). The view from the balcony was awesome. Enjoyed the pool, towels were provided. The location was awesome (beach across the street, so many restaurant choices with in a block). Tours picked up right in front of hotel or down the block at the Marriott)…
reviews.cons: I really can't think any complaints. Just know that this is not a 5star Hotel but it does provide a 5Star Stay for someone on a budget.

reviews.name: Margaret
reviews.headline: Perfect place to stay in Waikīkī if you are wanting to maximise views & location.
reviews.pros: Excellent location. Breakfast was different each day with plenty of choice. Super comfy beds. Beach rentals included in the stay.
reviews.cons: Beach towels were a hot commodity.

reviews.name: William
reviews.headline: Big Disappointment
reviews.pros: Location is great and rooms are outdated but clean
reviews.cons: This is not even close to a 4 star hotel. Pictures on website are definitely photo shopped. Hotel is outdated, trash cans always overflowing everywhere, never have towels for the pool. Stayed for 5 nights and unfortunately I booked nonrefundable. Met other couples that felt the same way. One even…

reviews.name: Leslie
reviews.pros: The pool, access to tikis, location
reviews.cons: The pillows were terrible and no beach towels available at the pool. People partying right Nextdoor-on the balcony until 3am.

reviews.name: Monina
reviews.headline: Not a bad stay but there are lots of room for improvement
reviews.pros: Location
reviews.cons: Expensive parking

reviews.name: Susan
reviews.headline: Wonderful, we would stay there again in a heartbeat.
reviews.pros: The whole unit was wonderful, especially the master suite. The views from our balcony were 360 degrees, from Diamond Head to Honolulu and were unbeatable and the spaciousness of the unit, the fact that it was self-contained and we were able to cater for ourselves, was great. You didn't really need…
reviews.cons: The air-conditioning, while working, was struggling to cool the place. It needs to be replaced. For the amount of room in the unit, the master bedroom taking up a great deal, it could have been better designed so that our grown-up family did not have to share two queen beds in one room, but we were…

reviews.name: Blaise
reviews.pros: Hotel is in a great location, right near the beach and a short walk into Waikiki. The room was spacious, great view, lots of light, clean. Staff were friendly and welcoming.
reviews.cons: Nothing.

reviews.name: Jennifer
reviews.headline: It was pleasant but hot the first night.
reviews.pros: Clean. Friendly staff. Good location. Free laundry. DIL likes the coffee van outside.
reviews.cons: The air conditioner did not work the first night. Slept with doors open on third floor. Wish we were higher in the building and next to the other room that I reserved.

reviews.name: Janet
reviews.headline: Lovely luxurious stay in great location.
reviews.pros: The rooms are so relaxing , the design and luxury. Staff all very kings and friendly.
reviews.cons: The restaurant was overpriced. There needs to be a breakfast and bar area.

reviews.name: Amanda
reviews.headline: The stay was short and sweet with lovely check in and check out process.
reviews.pros: We stayed in room 624, slightly older style. This room had a partial ocean view, but the mountain view was actually more impressive. The bathroom was nice and big and clean. The bed was comfortable and the white sheets were very clean. Loved having coffee and a fridge as well. Restaurant was…
reviews.cons: The only thing was the price, I wish it would have been a little bit cheaper. For 1 night is was fine, but if we wanted to come back for more days, might not be as affordable.

reviews.name: Don
reviews.headline: The staff was fantastic , Location great , Price to high for condition of the building
reviews.pros: The staff was exceptional
reviews.cons: The price for the room was high considering the age of the building

description: Luxury and Convenience The Royal Hawaiian, a Luxury Collection Resort in Waikiki, Honolulu, offers a fitness centre, full-service spa, on-property bakery, exclusive beach area, and cultural activities. Each room features tropical decor, garden or ocean views, and amenities like an iPod docking station and complimentary water. Leisure and Entertainment Guests can enjoy two outdoor pools, beach activities, a hot tub, and water sports rentals. The resort also provides daily cultural activities. reviews.name: Kessler
reviews.headline: Royal Hawaiian Waikiki Vacation Experience.
reviews.pros: We liked the location and the staff. We arrived at the hotel in the morning due to an early flight to Oahu and they accommodated our request for a very early check-in.
reviews.cons: We were very unhappy that there was no room service and no 24 hour places to get any type of food or drinks or coffee without leaving the hotel. Their bakery closes at 12 noon which is totally unacceptable for a luxury rated hotel. The restaurants disappointed us so we are most of our meals outside…

reviews.name: Angela
reviews.headline: The room was small, dark and crowded.not at all worth what they were charging us at the end.
reviews.pros: The property is beautiful and historic, which we appreciated.
reviews.cons: Most importantly, at the end of our stay, when we checked out we were shocked to know that we were over charged and incorrectly charged for our room. We had paid in full to Booking.com for our stay, so we found this experience upsetting.

reviews.name: SHIVANTHIE
reviews.pros: The location was great. Staff were friendly and helpful
reviews.cons: The price for the facilities offered was limited.

reviews.name: Antonio Tadeu
reviews.headline: Very good location, historical builidng, gourgeours gardens.
reviews.pros: Suite was very nice, location is excellent and the gardens are gourgeous
reviews.cons: Overall property Maintenance, cleanliness and amount of Events impacting the guest Services

reviews.name: Gong
reviews.headline: Upgrading of room decor, furnishings, and toiletries badly needed to bring hotel to luxury category.
reviews.pros: The hotel is located in the heart of Waikiki and our room, being an end unit had a full view of Waikiki beach.
reviews.cons: We had a very difficult time checking in despite providing a confirmed reservation number. For the price, the room decor and furnishings are sadly dated/worn and not considered luxury. No slippers were provided and the toiletries provided were basically generic and not of luxurious grade.

reviews.name: Junior
reviews.headline: Good structure and sea view
reviews.pros: The location and parking onsite, as well as, the sea view.
reviews.cons: I thought the room details a bit poor considering the money spent, however, the sea view is amazing and the resort has a good structure and breakfast included. The other point to highlight is the parking paid aside.

name: The Ritz-Carlton Residences, Waikiki Beach Hotel
description: Luxury Resort Experience Discover Waikiki’s most distinctive luxury resort experience at Oahu’s first Ritz-Carlton property. Featuring 552 ocean-view rooms and suites with gourmet kitchens and premium brand washers and dryers, this resort offers a blend of home conveniences and resort amenities. Premier Amenities Enjoy two of the highest infinity pools in Waikiki with private cabanas, a premier fitness center, yoga room, movie theatre, and a spa offering customized treatments. The resort also boasts the largest number of luxury suites on the island, ensuring a truly indulgent stay. Culinary Delights Indulge in a fine selection of dining experiences, from a sushi legend from Japan to modern F

reviews.name: John
reviews.headline: Classic RC experience with exceptional serivice.
reviews.pros: Beautiful well designed property with good restaurants and great service
reviews.cons: Location is far from the beach and in a neighborhood that is not fully safe or desirable.

reviews.name: Bizzell
reviews.headline: I enjoyed my stay. It was pricey considering they only did surface cleaning of the rooms. I expected them to clean bette
reviews.pros: The staff was incredibly kind and the location was good. I also enjoyed breakfast at the restaurant.
reviews.cons: Easy access to the beach and other areas.

reviews.name: Mariah
reviews.headline: Felt very personal
reviews.pros: Made my stay feel special and personal
reviews.cons: If they throw away a luffa please give me a new one

reviews.name: Christina
reviews.headline: Very decent choice but considerably overpriced.
reviews.pros: Excellent location, extremely convenient. Very kind staff, everyone was really eager to support with a smile. Room was spacious and clean.
reviews.cons: It’s a decent stay but totally overpriced for what it offers. The facilities need a refurbishment to justify this level of pricing - the quality is not representative of what someone would expect from Ritz-Carlton. It was also disappointing to see such a high parking cost for hotel guests.

reviews.name: Giulia
reviews.headline: Expensive stay with not great food options
reviews.pros: Rooms and service was great.
reviews.cons: The food absolutely not up to standard, very disappointing. No options for lunch whatsoever.

reviews.name: ESZTER
reviews.headline: We will never go back there, an AirBnB experience could have been better
reviews.pros: Not a lot. It was like an over paid airBnB, not a ritz-carlton.
reviews.cons: Extremely loud, noisy location. The dryer was broken. The ground floor is like a wind tunnel, stormy, unpleasant to get out of the car regardless the crew. The handlers in the bathroom has cut my forehead, they are so sharp. The aircon on the corridors is so cold, like being in a freezer. Luckily…

name: Hilton Hawaiian Village Waikiki Beach Resort
facilities: Staff adhere to local safety protocols
Cleaning standards that are effective against Coronavirus
description: Luxurious Beachfront Resort Hilton Hawaiian Village Waikiki Beach Resort offers a tropical paradise spread across 22 acres along the stunning Waikiki Beach. With five pools, including a 10,000 square foot Super Pool, and top-notch water activities, guests can soak up the sun and enjoy the best of Waikiki. Abundant Amenities From daily cultural activities like lei making and hula lessons to complimentary access to the fitness center and Mandara Spa, guests can indulge in relaxation and wellness. The resort's variety of restaurants, shops, and newly renovated rooms ensure a comfortable and enjoyable stay. Convenient and Safe Stay Located close to Downtown Honolulu and the airport, Hilton Hawai

reviews.name: Sam
reviews.headline: Great location, great staff and great value.
reviews.pros: The location is great. The staff is amazing! This is our second visit.
reviews.cons: Wish I could get the room cooler

reviews.name: Yolanda
reviews.headline: It was very good, the beach is so close just cross street.
reviews.pros: Location, rooms are very comfortable and our room has an excellent view. Also they have Circle de Solei and it was wonderful.
reviews.cons: Needs more tourist information

reviews.name: Maddison
reviews.headline: Overall Amazing Experience
reviews.pros: Overall amazing experience! the staff were lovely and rooms were very clean.
reviews.cons: There could have been more breakfast options for the included breakfast

reviews.name: Brian
reviews.headline: You can call a pig a princess but it is still a pig.
reviews.pros: Not much. I set my expectations on my previous experience visiting the REAL OUTRIGGER Hotel years ago. It appears Outrigger had decided to bastardize its name by selling it and slapping it on adjacent hotels and deceive the public that they are staying at an "Outrigger" resort. Nothing can be…
reviews.cons: Location, name, parking, pool, other "amenities" , the guests, beds, view, layout of the hotel,

reviews.name: OLGA
reviews.headline: We loved the location - have stayed before and will again
reviews.pros: Very central and clean and friendly
reviews.cons: The swimming pool is far too small And it needs a better bar and restaurant

reviews.name: Gail
reviews.headline: I will stay here again for sure!!
reviews.pros: I stay here often - was an Aston property back in the day (1985) lol.....and I stay loyal! Close to everything. Beach right across the street. Great restaurants super close. Like having to go up off the main walk way to get into the hotel. Views are always great from outside areas and rooms! :*)
reviews.cons: That non hotel guests came for happy hour :( Maybe choose to only have happy hour for non guests on just one day, not everyday. There is limited seating, so this encroaches on paying guests ability to find seating. Maybe reconfigure in pool area and put a counter type bar along outside wall with…

reviews.name: barbara
reviews.headline: Great room -great staff
reviews.pros: We were upgraded to a ocean front king and it was wonderful . The staff was great! We are members at the Outrigger canoe club and walked over every day
reviews.cons: It’s a little tired but our view made up for it

reviews.name: Robert
reviews.headline: The views and location were amazing!
reviews.pros: The view from the ocean view rooms was amazing! We loved the huge windows. We had such an amazing view of Waikiki Beach!
reviews.cons: The bed was a little soft.

reviews.name: Tunisia
reviews.headline: A beautiful place to stay with lots of activities in the area.
reviews.pros: Close to the beach, had its own salon, coffee shop and local store on site staff were friendly and considerate. Great location for long walks and sightseeing
reviews.cons: Unfortunately the beach was closed but understandably due to wild life on the beach.

reviews.name: nicole
reviews.headline: Since I like running to Cromwell, I would stay there again.
reviews.pros: The view was wonderful. The bed and pillows were comfortable and the sheets were crisp.
reviews.cons: Room was a tad small and for the price of the room I would have expected a bathrobe and slippers, there was not a full length mirror and the light cans were flickering.

reviews.name: Tarzanjr
reviews.headline: Overpriced three star room with limited parking/few amenities at five star prices due to location.
reviews.pros: The location is excellent. It is by its own beach and it is a short walk to Waikiki Beach and downtown Waikiki shopping. Great view from the room with a couple large panoramic windows.
reviews.cons: Very busy, only parking was $55 a day valet. Three star room at five star prices. No microwave or coffee maker in room and no courtesy coffee in lobby. Very expensive (and below average food) restaurant off lobby only place to get coffee. Hotel lets you borrow a towel, but no fins/snorkels or other…

reviews.name: William
reviews.pros: Nice rooms, great beach, good restaurant
reviews.cons: Parking is on street

reviews.name: Timothy
reviews.headline: Good value in Hawaii
reviews.pros: Good location, spacious room. reasonable cost for the area. The food trucks across the road were great.
reviews.cons: Nothing

reviews.name: Bouchard
reviews.headline: Amazing staff great price
reviews.pros: Staff was amazing, friendly and helpful especially Larissa who helped with canceling a booking mistake. Location was fantastic, walking distance to everything.
reviews.cons: Pillows were not great very hard and flat. We stayed in 2 different rooms, second room A/C was not sufficient enough to cool the room. Kids in the pool from open to close, specifically 4 young girls under 12 with no supervision. There should be adult only swim times. More lighting at night around…

reviews.name: KAW
reviews.headline: Great Location, Extra Fees!
reviews.pros: This location was great. It was close to a lot of places to eat and shop. The room had a kitchen setup and lots of room.
reviews.cons: This hotel added an amenity fee that was not mentioned on the website. Housekeeping did not clean room daily. We were told they would for an additional fee. No linens, soap, or shampoo replaced. They would not refund our night that we were not able to stay.

reviews.name: Uriel
reviews.headline: The best stay
reviews.pros: Wednesday and Fridays there’s complimentary cheese and crackers with a musician Great location and loved the pool
reviews.cons: The ac wasn’t the strongest but it worked out

reviews.name: Gabriela
reviews.headline: Very expensive for an old hotel without car parking
reviews.pros: Location is great. Overall value for money it does not meet.
reviews.cons: A lot of noises coming above our room. No car parking even though they say they have, it is 3rd party car parking next to the hotel.

reviews.name: Ariadna
reviews.headline: Enjoyed my stay and definitely will book again in the future.
reviews.pros: The property was clean and the staff were great. The location of the property was amazing. Great places to eat a block away.
reviews.cons: Everything was great!

reviews.name: Angela
reviews.pros: Location was great
reviews.cons: Aircon was very loud

reviews.name: Debora Sofia
reviews.pros: Breakfast. The hotel staff was also super helpful.
reviews.cons: We were supposed to be on the 17th floor but we arrived super earlier and we payed for the early checkin. However, the only room available at the time was on the 8th. Since it was a lower floor, the room was a bit noisy and smelled like old. Plus, the shower did not work properly.

reviews.name: Najah
reviews.pros: The staff was very helpful and friendly.
reviews.cons: The rooms are a bit old and worn

reviews.name: Julie
reviews.pros: Clean. Close to everything and 2 blocks fr beach. Public bus outside. Towels chairs etc free for beach.
reviews.cons: Nothing

reviews.name: Ilias
reviews.headline: Great and inexpensive place, offering a lot of amenities
reviews.pros: Incredible staff, they really helped with every aspect of my stay. If you have an early tour, you may request a breakfast box, so you won’t stay hungry! Overall, this hotel has everything a person needs, and I would definitely consider staying there should I return to Waikiki.
reviews.cons: The only downside is that there is no laundry in the hotel, but you can find a few laundromats not too far away from the hotel

reviews.name: SHEIKH
reviews.headline: Very very good.
reviews.pros: Wonderful staff, especially Melvin at the reception. He is simply excellent. He was very helpful and understanding. Others in the reception are also very helpful. The room service was great. 24-hr tea: coffee & water service was great.
reviews.cons: Tea/coffee making facilities in the rooms. An ironing board would help.

OUTRIGGER Waikiki Paradise Hotel souvenir nylon drawstring beach bag (1 per room).Guests are required to show a photo ID and credit card upon check-in. Please note that all Special Requests are subject to availability and additional charges may apply. A deposit may be required at the property.

policies.name: Groups
policies.description: When booking more than 9 rooms, different policies and additional supplements may apply.

policies.name: Children and extra bed policy
policies.description: Children of any age are allowed. Children up to and including 2 years old stay for free when using an available cot. Children up to and including 17 years old stay for free when using an existing bed. People no matter the age stay for US$65 per person per night when using an available extra bed. Any type of extra bed or child's cot/crib is upon request and needs to be confirmed by management. Supplements are not calculated automatically in the total costs and will have to be paid for separately during your stay.

policies.name: Parking
policies.description: Private parking is possible on site (reservation is not needed) and costs USD 50 per day.

reviews.name: Guest
reviews.headline: Great Experience.
reviews.pros: I liked that the hotel was priced well and it was very close to everything. The beach was only a block a way. We found a cute tourist shop as well, so were able to purchase souvenirs. Our car rental was just down the street. Everything seemed close.
reviews.cons: We arrived late because our plane was delayed, so we got to the hotel about 9:00ish and there was only one person at the check in counter. It was annoying because we wanted to grab the key and get to the room as quickly as possible. But I wouldn't say the wait was that long. We were just tired.

reviews.name: Darren koops
reviews.pros: Great location from shopping departments an also to the beach ⛱️ an great pool am spa an lounge chairs an free cabanas Highly recommended
reviews.cons: Mattress medium -soft as I'm used to medium- firm but not a big deal

reviews.name: Lynn
reviews.headline: Enjoyable stay
reviews.pros: The location was good. Close to Waikiki beach, cafes, ABCs etc
reviews.cons: Our initial presentation when politely asking if we could check in - it was around 11:00am was to be curtly told it would cost an extra $75.00 to check-in. We had had an early departure from our cruise ship so asked if there was somewhere we might be able to store our suitcases was again to be told…

reviews.name: John
reviews.headline: I had a wonderful time
reviews.pros: Everything was great. The staff were all so nice and helpful.
reviews.cons: Nothing!

reviews.name: Jeri
reviews.headline: Good, but eating in waikiki is expensive!
reviews.pros: Clean, recently refreshed Close to beach Good parking area
reviews.cons: The restaurant was good, but limited and expensive. But priced about the same as other restaurant in waikiki

reviews.name: Nadine
reviews.headline: Great location
reviews.pros: Room was comfortable. Conveniently located to shops, target etc and a short walk to the beach.
reviews.cons: I can’t fault the hotel, though currently there are building works across the road- a little noisy early morning with trucks and workers.

name: Sheraton Waikiki Beach Resort
facilities: Guest education on local ecosystems and culture
description: Experience the ultimate Hawaiian getaway at our luxurious Sheraton Waikiki Beach Resort, just steps away from the breathtaking Waikiki beach and vibrant local attractions. Indulgent Spa Services Pamper yourself with our serene spa, offering rejuvenating massages, body treatments, and facial experiences tailored to elevate your relaxation. Recreational Amenities Dive into leisure with our two outdoor swimming pools, blissful hot tubs, and exhilarating waterslide—perfect for family fun or a refreshing retreat. Gourmet Dining Choices Savor exquisite Asian cuisine at RumFire or explore our seven dining establishments and cozy café. After a delicious meal, unwind at our bars and poolside lounges
importantInfo: Pool access available from 8:00 AM to 8:00 PM. Reservations are required for spa treatments. Reservations can be made by contacting the hotel prior to arrival, using the contact information on the booking confirmation. The property has connecting/adjoining rooms, which are subject to availability and can be requested by contacting the property using the number on the booking confirmation. A car is not required for transportation to and from this property. Parking height restrictions apply. This property welcomes guests of all sexual orientations and gender identities (LGBTQ+ friendly).

reviews.name: Rozella
reviews.headline: Outstanding customer service!
reviews.pros: The location was perfect and within walking distance of restaurants, stores, and the beach.
reviews.cons: The pool hours should be extended for those who like to swim early or late.

reviews.name: Deborah
reviews.headline: Beautiful hotel in the heart of Waikiki offering amenities for couples and families.
reviews.pros: Location, pools and direct beach access. Room type matched our request. Appreciated toothbrush and toothpaste. Liked being close to other hotels. Included pool chaise chairs were plentiful though full. But that happens. Lei making and ukulele sessions were fun. Liked the shops, especially Honolulu…
reviews.cons: I didn’t realize complimentary newspapers were available. Also, I think robes and slippers should automatically be placed in the room.

reviews.name: John
reviews.headline: A luxury stay we were pleased to have splashed out on.
reviews.pros: The ocean view [from the 26th floor] was stunning. Very clean. Maybe just a tad small - nowhere to put open the suitcase out of the way. Rumfire bar was excellent and not too busy, even on Memorial day.
reviews.cons: It is expensive, and in the US way they do add and add extra taxes and charges onto the bill.

reviews.name: Cindy
reviews.headline: The Stay was great. That was our only complaint.
reviews.pros: I like the pool areas
reviews.cons: Our room had a really bad order from the drain in the bathroom

reviews.name: Aldo
reviews.pros: Location. It's very well placed in the middle of shopping area and beach
reviews.cons: Cleanliness, staff attitude

reviews.name: Cobus
reviews.headline: What a view from the room!
reviews.pros: Location, location, location.
reviews.cons: Would have loved a dedicated shower. That’s it.

name: Hilton Garden Inn Waikiki Beach
facilities: Staff adhere to local safety protocols
Cleaning standards that are effective against Coronavirus
Hand sanitizer in guest room and key areas
Guests can opt-out any cleaning services during stay
description: Convenient Location near Waikiki Beach Located just a 5-minute walk from the famous Waikiki Beach, Hilton Garden Inn Waikiki Beach offers a prime location adjacent to shopping and dining areas. Modern Rooms with Amenities Each air-conditioned room features free WiFi, a 48-inch cable TV, and select rooms even offer a furnished balcony. Enjoy amenities like a Keurig coffee machine, microwave, and petite refrigerator for added convenience. Dining and Leisure Options Indulge in American cuisine at the full-service bar and restaurant, TR Fire Grill, or opt for grab-and-go options at The Holoholo Cafe and Market. Unwind at the outdoor swimming pool or stay active at the onsite fitness center. Read
importantInfo: There is no airport shuttle service. Pets are allowed up to 22 kg. Breakfast Included Package offers daily breakfast for up to 2 registered adult guests, and up to 2 children 5 years old and under Upon check-in, a hold may be placed on your card for the full anticipated amount to be owed to the hotel, including $100 per day daily incidental charge, through your date of check-out. Any such hold may not be released for 72 hours from the date of check-out or longer at the discretion of your card issuer. Hilton Garden Inn Waikiki Beach is committed to providing its guests and associates with a smoke-free environment. Smoking tobacco, pipes, vapes, e-cigarets and marijuana are strictly prohibited within the Hilton Garden Inn Waikiki Beach. By booking through this website, you acknowledge that the Hilton Garden Inn Waikiki Beach has installed smoking detection sensors in its rooms. The smart device allows hotel management to respond to smoking events without disrupting your stay. You hereby agree and consent to the use of such sensor in your room and acknowledge and agree that it is 100% privacy compliant and required by the Hilton Garden Inn Waikiki Beach. name: Moana Surfrider, A Westin Resort & Spa, Waikiki Beach
facilities: Guest education on local ecosystems and culture
Staff adhere to local safety protocols
Cleaning standards that are effective against Coronavirus
description: Luxurious Accommodations and Stunning Views Experience the ultimate relaxation at Moana Surfrider, A Westin Resort & Spa, Waikiki Beach. Indulge in tranquil island-themed rooms with balconies offering breathtaking ocean or city views. Enjoy modern amenities like flat-screen TVs and mini-refrigerators, along with complimentary gourmet tea and coffee. Gourmet Dining and Stellar Wine Collection Savor a culinary journey at our on-site restaurants, from traditional Hawaiian cuisine to classic American dishes. Start your day with breakfast at Veranda At The Beachhouse and end with a delightful dinner at Beachhouse At The Moana, boasting Victorian architecture and ocean views. Wine enthusiasts
importantInfo: When booking a nonrefundable full prepayment rate, the resort fee will also be charged at the time of booking. Rooms booked with breakfast included apply for 2 guests per room. Please be advised that effective August 1, 2025, Moana Surfriders’ resort fee will be changed to $54 plus tax. The resort fee includes: • Fresh Orchid Lei greeting upon arrival – one time • Reef safe body lotion one bottle per arrival • Daily Yoga classes for two guests • Daily Meditation classes for two guests • Moana tote bag per room, per stay • Daily surfing demonstration for two guests • Daily Cultural Activities for two guests. (Storytelling with Tutu: 9:30a M & Thu; Ukulele Lessons: 10:00a M, W, & F; Hula Lessons: 10:00a T, Thu, Sat, & Sun; Lei Making, 12:00p daily; Haku Kupe’e Bracelet, 12:00p Thu; Lauhala Making, 12:00p Tue; Princess Ka’iulani Historic Tour: 12:30p M & W; Moana Surfrider Historic Tour, 1:00p M & W; Ribbon Lei Making: 2:00p F & Sat; Fishpond Feeding: 2:00p M, W, & F; Mai Tai Demonstration: 4:00p F) •Daily Enhanced High -Speed Internet Access (Wi-Fi) Bonvoy Elite Amenity (Gold members and above): Daily Tommy Bahama beach chairs for two guestsGuests are required to show a photo ID and

reviews.name: Lusa
reviews.headline: Iconic beach hotel
reviews.pros: The location of this hotel is perfect for anyone wanting to stay on the beach. It is a beautiful and iconic hotel that just celebrated 125 years. When you check in, you get a lei, and I also got a free lotion. The check in line is also not as long as other hotels and moves fairly quickly.
reviews.cons: The only issue is the cost. The bathroom was also pretty small in the Banyan room with a partial ocean view.

reviews.name: Helen
reviews.headline: Excellent stay, beautiful location
reviews.pros: Location
reviews.cons: No room service

reviews.name: Carl
reviews.headline: Location! Location! Location!
reviews.pros: The location both to the beach and streets where everything is happening is what we liked the most.
reviews.cons: No Room Service, No Mini Bar stacked with both alcohol and food and the beds weren't as comfortable as they were when stayed back in 2007.

reviews.name: Ellis
reviews.headline: Location, unbeatable history, and modern conveniences perfectly combine.
reviews.pros: Location Location Location
reviews.cons: Loved it all!!

reviews.name: Karen
reviews.pros: location as always, we only come to the wakiki water front, after a few small staffing behaviours well go back to Pink Palace next time
reviews.cons: dissapointed to see trash in a hallway overnight and sometimes well into the next day, a quick whip thru by a clean is needed more often, went to front desk and was thoroughhly ignored by your "elite" desk whilst waitng for another service person, even a smile and a wont be a minute would be well…

reviews.name: Julie
reviews.headline: a great choice to be centrally located and walkable to many places
reviews.pros: the amazing bed, the location and the rockers on the porch were great
reviews.cons: nothing

name: Waikiki Beach Marriott Resort & Spa
facilities: Staff adhere to local safety protocols
Cleaning standards that are effective against Coronavirus
Hand sanitizer in guest room and key areas
description: Luxurious Amenities Waikiki Beach Marriott Resort & Spa, located across from the famous Waikiki beach, offers guests a truly luxurious experience. With 5 restaurants to choose from and the Royal Kaila Spa on-site, relaxation and indulgence are always at your fingertips. Entertainment and Recreation Guests at Marriott Waikiki Beach Resort and Spa can stay active and entertained with access to a gym, 2 outdoor swimming pools, and nightly live entertainment by the pool. Whether you prefer a workout or a refreshing dip, there's something for everyone to enjoy. Convenient Location Conveniently situated just a short walk from popular attractions like the Honolulu Zoo and Waikiki Aquarium, as w
importantInfo: Parking charges for registered and non-registered guests vary. Please check the hotel policy or contact the hotel for rates. Only the "Breakfast Included" rate includes a daily breakfast for 2 adults. Additional breakfasts can be purchased for an additional fee. Resort fee plus applicable taxes includes: • 2 Beach chairs, 2 Boogie boards or 1 Beach Chair and 1 Boogie board from Waikiki Sand Bar • Fitness Classes Daily • Cultural Classes Daily • Nanea Game Room Access • $10 Off Premium Golf Club Rentals and Discounted Tee Times at Hawaii Tee Times • 30% off your Electric Bike ride at Hele on Waikiki • Resort fee inclusions subject to change Additional discounts from select shops and activity providers located at the resortGuests are required to show a photo ID and credit card upon check-in. Please note that all Special Requests are subject to availability and additional charges may apply. In the event of an early departure, the property will charge you the full amount for your stay. A deposit may be required at the property.

Supplements are not calculated automatically in the total costs and will have to be paid for separately during your stay.

reviews.name: Tiffany
reviews.headline: Great location, but the construction noise and lack of balcony access made the stay less enjoyable than expected.
reviews.pros: You can’t beat the location. We were able to walk to most of the places we wanted to visit. A great home base for exploring the area. Walking distance to the beach and an ABC store on every corner
reviews.cons: While the hotel has a great location, our stay was impacted by ongoing construction. The noise started early and continued throughout the day, making it difficult to relax. We were also disappointed that the balcony was inaccessible during our stay, which was one of the features we were looking…

reviews.name: Jennifer
reviews.headline: Good location but hotel was not what it should’ve been.
reviews.pros: Room was nice, clean and updated
reviews.cons: Couldn’t use our balcony, we were not made aware of the construction with ongoing at the hotel at time of booking.

reviews.name: Kerry
reviews.headline: There are better options that are more reasonable and higher quality experiences available whilst construction works are
reviews.pros: Our sea view room was very comfortable and the best part of our stay. You could just make out the sea if you stood at the right angle on the balcony.
reviews.cons: Construction works. Plus we thought that we had booked a resort experience. This property is more so a large 3 star in need of a refurb however still charging 4 star rates plus a daily resort fee whilst the property was undergoing construction.

reviews.name: Daniel
reviews.headline: Beautiful, well worth the money
reviews.pros: Beautiful hotel, amazing location, right on the beach side
reviews.cons: Staff were painfully slow at helping with any requirements, asked something simple about my room and they had me waiting 30 mins for it

reviews.name: Baker
reviews.headline: Good for a few days, we liked the location and ocean view.
reviews.pros: Location was just perfect, especially if having kids as it’s close to the protected bay in Waikiki.
reviews.cons: The two double beds in the room were very small. Breakfast can be significantly improved.

reviews.name: Latoya
reviews.headline: Overall it is a beautiful property but I think diversity and inclusion practices need to be taught.
reviews.pros: I had a great stay until the end. The property is nice, the food could be better but overall the property wasn’t the issue.
reviews.cons: The day before I checked out I requested a late check out for 1pm. It was approved and they switched my keys out. The day of departure I woke up with a letter for balances to be paid before departure. I continued to the pool and vacationing and was going to handle those balances at check out as I…

name: Hilton Waikiki Beach Resort & Spa
facilities: Staff adhere to local safety protocols
Cleaning standards that are effective against Coronavirus
Hand sanitizer in guest room and key areas
description: Ocean Views and Modern Amenities Experience the beauty of Waikiki Beach from your own private balcony at Hilton Waikiki Beach Hotel. Enjoy modern comforts like flat-screen TVs, premium channels, and complimentary toiletries in every room. Delicious Dining Options Indulge in a mouthwatering meal at M.A.C. 24/7 restaurant and bar, or opt for the convenience of 24-hour room service. Start your day right with a delicious breakfast before heading out to explore the island. Concierge Services and Nearby Attractions Let our concierge assist you in planning the perfect Hawaiian adventure. Whether you want to relax on the sundeck with a cocktail or explore the local attractions like Waikiki Beach Wal
importantInfo: Please note: The hotel offers valet only parking. There is a daily rate plus tax. Guests have in and out privileges. There is an additional charge for oversize parking. A Daily Resort Charge plus tax is assessed per room, per night. Please note that the Daily Resort Charge is assessed at check-in. This daily charge may not always be added to the final online transaction for reservations made through this website or through online travel websites or travel agencies. Please contact the property for details. *A Daily Resort Charge plus tax is assessed per room, per night. *Please note that the Daily Resort Charge is assessed at check-in. *This daily charge may not always be added to the final online transaction for reservations made through this website or through online travel websites or travel agencies. *The resort fee includes daily rental of one beach chair, surfboard, or boogie board, unlimited DVD NOW rentals, lei-making and yoga classes, games and activities on our recreation deck, shopping passports for Ala Moana Shopping Center and International Marketplace with exclusive discounts, Wifi access, local and domestic long-distance calls, magic classes, and beach towels.Guests a

policies.name: Pets
policies.description: Pets are not allowed.

policies.name: Groups
policies.description: When booking more than 9 rooms, different policies and additional supplements may apply.

policies.name: Children and extra bed policy
policies.description: Children of any age are allowed. Children up to and including 3 years old stay for free when using an available cot. Children up to and including 17 years old stay for free when using an existing bed. You haven't added any extra beds. Any type of extra bed or child's cot/crib is upon request and needs to be confirmed by management.

policies.name: Internet
policies.description: WiFi is available in the hotel rooms and costs USD 10.95 per 24 hours.

policies.name: Parking
policies.description: Private parking is possible on site (reservation is not needed) and costs USD 55 per day.
