reviews.name: Mandy
reviews.headline: Short stay, expensive for the location. Comfortable bed though
reviews.pros: Proximity to shops.
reviews.cons: Unfriendly staff

reviews.name: Amanda
reviews.pros: The staff were all helpful and we had an amazing view. Loved the extra amenities, the pool and mini putt area was cool.
reviews.cons: The resort fee upfront was hefty and unexpected but at least it was partially refunded at the end.

reviews.name: magdalena
reviews.headline: Great hotel except for the included breakfast
reviews.pros: I loved the location, the staff was great, parking on the same hotel is expensive, but they have valet parking that works great. They also provide towels for the beach or pool and you can ask for a boogie/surf board or chair for free for the day.
reviews.cons: I didn't like the breakfast that was included. It was very low quality. The coffee comes from a horrible machine, tasted like the worst coffee you can get at Walmart. Not too many options of fruit, cereal dispenser didn't work, eggs were made from a box. If you are staying for a week it becomes…

reviews.name: Manjunath
reviews.headline: Not value for money
reviews.pros: Location
reviews.cons: Breakfast and service was not upto expectation

reviews.name: MEI
reviews.headline: Good choice!
reviews.pros: good location，free room updated without requesting!
reviews.cons: Parking is difficult and charging 60dollars per night is higher than others

reviews.name: Christopher
reviews.headline: Overall comfortable and clean. Pleasant stay
reviews.pros: Book in process was smooth. Support from staff when guidance/assistance needed was efficient and very polite
reviews.cons: Noise from the air-conditioning vent was unusually loud. The complimentary coffee etc was a bit light on -- especially the tiny little milk cups -- only two of them was not adequate. Paid the account by cash but the credit card swipe is still active and showing as "pending" on my Bank -- should be…

name: Waikiki Circle Hotel by Castle
facilities: Guests can opt-out any cleaning services during stay
description: Unique Shape and Prime Location Aston Waikiki Circle Hotel stands out with its uniquely-shaped building, a landmark along Waikiki’s Kalakaua Avenue, just across from the famous Waikiki Beach. Comfortable Rooms and Modern Amenities The guest rooms, decorated in calming shades of green and aqua blue, offer balconies with ocean or city views. Enjoy modern amenities such as air conditioning, a mini-refrigerator, Keurig coffee maker, and a 40-inch LCD TV with CastNow streaming. Dining and Entertainment Options Indulge in delicious meals at the on-site “Eggs 'n Things” restaurant and catch a free hula show on select days. Children are treated with complimentary beach toys. Ready to experience the
importantInfo: Resort fee includes the following amenities: - CastNow streaming service. - Coffee and tea daily - Daily newspaper - Daily in-room safe - High-speed Internet access and WiFi - Local and Toll-Free calls. - Bishop Museum admission for one adult and children under 17. - Honolulu Museum of Art admission for one adult and children under 18. - Shell lei greeting upon arrival - Free local calls - DVD Movie Rentals The hotel collects the Resort fee of USD 26 + taxes per night. Housekeeping service is offered every 3rd day of stay.Guests are required to show a photo ID and credit card upon check-in. reviews.name: Maria Antonette
reviews.headline: Location is amazing!
reviews.pros: Location
reviews.cons: The room needs upgrading, the shower water pressure was so low you can’t enjoy a decent shower end of the day. When you finally get pressure by adjusting water head, it goes on bathroom floor since the shower is so tiny.

reviews.name: steven
reviews.headline: Great location for the beach and the views were excellent,
reviews.pros: Location was great, rooms were ok and parking guys were great and the front desk was also very good.
reviews.cons: Nothing was what I expected for the price

reviews.name: Janine
reviews.headline: Woulod stay there definitely again and ask for roon 1402!
reviews.pros: Awesome location! Staff extra friendly and helpful. Beds very comfy and room with its ocean view just gorgeous! Towels on demand and as the beach was lirterally across the road excellent service! Very happy to order taxi or rideshare for us!
reviews.cons: Very difficult to get into the breakfast cafe located next to Circle Hotel. However, only a block walk to another very tasty place so not an issue.

reviews.name: Cristell
reviews.headline: Excellent Location and Value for Money!
reviews.pros: Excellent location, very accommodating staff
reviews.cons: rooms are small for a family of 4 but still okay, driveway is also small

reviews.name: Marguerite
reviews.pros: Perfect location
reviews.cons: A little dated

reviews.name: Miranda
reviews.pros: The location is amazing, right on Waikiki beach.. The staff is friendly and helpful. Wonderful restaurant on site. Clean rooms. Surf boards and other beach equipment for rent on site.
reviews.cons: The room was small for 4, but doable. And the mattress was not very comfortable.

description: Luxurious Accommodations with Stunning Views White Sands Hotel offers rooms with private balconies showcasing either pool or city views. Each room is equipped with a 40-inch flat-screen LCD TV, a microwave, and a small refrigerator. Culinary Delights at Heyday Restaurant Indulge in a unique dining experience at Heyday, where traditional Hawaiian cuisine is reimagined with a modern and international flair. Enjoy innovative cocktails at the circular bamboo bar, the only one on the island where you can swing while savoring Hawaiian-inspired drinks. reviews.name: Jacinta
reviews.headline: Great vibes, great location, great bar and happy hour!
reviews.pros: Great location and such a cool vibe the hotel had. There is a great bar with a fantastic happy hour. We loved our stay. Easy to walk to anywhere you want too in Waikiki.
reviews.cons: The floor in the room was filthy I wipe it with a face washer and it was black.

reviews.name: Albert
reviews.headline: Good location, but expensive to eat or drink there.
reviews.pros: Good location.
reviews.cons: Our check-in was delayed by 2 hours. We were given a $50 credit, but everything was so expensive, it didn’t take long to use that up. Taking advantage of amenities was very complicated.

reviews.name: Mundey
reviews.headline: Disappointing to say the least
reviews.pros: Location was central but the street was awful. Pool/bar staff very friendly and helpful
reviews.cons: Where do I start! The room was dirty, noisy and there were no facilities to make drinks or eat so why have a microwave? There were only outside steps up to the 3rd floor - this was unexpected and dangerous as it rained a little most days. The signs don’t make it less dangerous!The road the hotel…

reviews.name: Gabriela
reviews.pros: Well located, good staff and the balcony was a plus!
reviews.cons: No parking, curtains shower (they could ou a glass door)

reviews.name: József
reviews.pros: It was one of the cheapest hotel at Waikiki beach when i booked it, but everything was perfect for the price. They let me to check-in earlier. The room was beautiful with a nice view to the inner garden, everything is very green. The hot bath is very nice and the pool area also. The airport bus…
reviews.cons: In the kitchen there was no silverware.

reviews.name: traveller019283
reviews.headline: Disappointing
reviews.pros: Can't understand all the great reviews. Overall, the hotel needed a good clean but we specifically asked 2 different reception staff to have the floor of our room cleaned and it never was. Room wasn't serviced during our 3-night stay. Another guest was assigned our room and came right through the…

description: Luxurious Beachfront Property Stunning Views and Modern Comforts Experience the breathtaking city or ocean views from our brightly decorated rooms, each equipped with a flat-screen TV, coffee machine, and refrigerator. Enjoy the convenience of our onsite restaurant with nightly entertainment and a tour desk to assist with planning your itinerary. Immerse Yourself in Hawaiian Culture Indulge in live music and cultural activities at Te Moana Nui - Tales of the Pacific, offering lei making and Polynesian tattooing. Stay active at the fitness centre or unwind at the Pikake Terrace for local cuisine. Don't miss out on the poolside Splash Bar & Bento for refreshing drinks. Explore Nearby Attra
importantInfo: When booking a nonrefundable full prepayment rate, the resort fee will also be charged at the time of booking. Please note: The "Breakfast Included" rate includes breakfast for 2 guests per room. The resort fee includes: - WiFi Premium Access in Guestrooms and public areas - MiFi Rental - unlimited high-speed wireless on Island (Complimentary rental of 1 MiFi per room per stay) - Complimentary one-day rental of GoPro Camera (1 per room per stay) - Yoga Class - Yoga Nidra Meditation - Daily Cultural Activities - lei making, ukulele lessons, hula lessons and Ho‘ala Morning Ritual. Resort fee rate and inclusions are subject to changeGuests are required to show a photo ID and credit card upon check-in. Please note that all Special Requests are subject to availability and additional charges may apply. In the event of an early departure, the property will charge you the full amount for your stay. reviews.name: Maureen
reviews.headline: I will happily stay here on my next visit.
reviews.pros: The location in the middle of Waikiki is excellent. I like that the hotel is set back so much from the street with the main entrance on the side street. reviews.cons: I was not disappointed by anything at the hotel.

reviews.name: Ernest
reviews.headline: Good value for a stay in Hawaii
reviews.pros: Location and staff were outstanding
reviews.cons: There really was nothing that I disliked about the hotel.

reviews.name: Lily
reviews.headline: A very nice and clean hotel that is very convenient located.
reviews.pros: The location and room space. It is if very easy access to many shops and restaurants. Also quite close to the beaches. Staff were also very friendly.
reviews.cons: The sofa doesn’t feel clean and extra blankets given are old. Although we booked an Ocean View high floor, the view was blocked by another hotel but we could still see a portion of the ocean.

reviews.name: Bridget
reviews.pros: Great views & staff was always welcoming to us guest as well as amazing location very close to quite everything definitely would stay here again !
reviews.cons: Parking was definitely on the pricey side $55 so definitely a big number when staying awhile. Also parking structure is very narrow and very easy to hit your car so definitely becareful while driving!

reviews.name: Catherine
reviews.headline: Happy with the say
reviews.pros: Perfect location. Very generous room size. Very clear with all charges.
reviews.cons: The room decor quality could be better

reviews.name: Patricia
reviews.pros: This location is in a great spot and they have beach chairs and umbrellas to use for the close beach. Along with unlimited beach towels for the pool and beach. The rooms are also very nice and the staff was helpful.
reviews.cons: Some of the rooms were awkwardly laid out no way to see the tv from bed. and the bed themselves were not super comfortable l also don’t like they charged almost $50 per room per night for amenities on top of the room rate. There was no breakfast or drinks in the hotel at all. The pool doesn’t go…

reviews.name: Dovie
reviews.pros: I liked the bathroom and the bed and closet and the dimmable lights.
reviews.cons: The worn down leather on the chair.

Amenities Galore Unwind on the large sun deck, take a dip in the outdoor pool, or relax in the hot tub. reviews.name: Sang jin
reviews.headline: Fair
reviews.pros: Location. Cleanness,
reviews.cons: No hot water, airconditioner was too nosy

reviews.name: Christina
reviews.headline: I would stay again I would just request to make sure that my linen is clean
reviews.pros: It was right in the middle of mostly everything so we could walk. Most of the staff was nice
reviews.cons: The bedding and towels were dirty, visibily dirty. There was a women at the concierge desk after recheck in that we both me and my kids feel very uncomfortable with all the questions she was asking us and wouldn’t even let us like walk away to go get a room

reviews.name: Sudipto
reviews.headline: Disappointing experince.
reviews.pros: Breakfast was good, lot of options to choose from and quite convenient to get started with the day.
reviews.cons: Room was too small. Elevators have a horrible experience. People had to be in queue for several minutes before being able to go up or down. Location was far from beach. No good view from hotel room. Price to comfort ratio is poor.

reviews.name: Gloria
reviews.pros: Price was reasonable for the area. Staff was nice.
reviews.cons: $51 to park per day with no guarantee you will have a slot to park in if you leave and return. Slowest elevator ever often waited 15 minutes for an elevator.

reviews.name: Page
reviews.headline: Wouldn’t go back
reviews.pros: Location
reviews.cons: Very crowded, elevators were terrible- waited an average of 10 minutes to get on an elevator. Totally ridiculous

reviews.name: IRENE
reviews.headline: Holiday Inn Express has the Aloha spirit.
reviews.pros: The property is conveniently located near the beach, offering easy access to two shopping malls and numerous restaurants. The cleanliness of the property is commendable, and paid parking is available on-site. The excursion pick-up is either right on the property or just across the street. The hotel…
reviews.cons: There were six elevators and they were always busy but adequate.

description: Convenient Location Situated across from the Ala Wai Canal, Coconut Waikiki Hotel offers easy access to the Royal Hawaiian Shopping Center, just a short walk away. Modern Amenities Each guest room is equipped with a microwave, wet bar, and coffee machine. Enjoy a 40-inch flat-screen TV, work desk, and upscale toiletries in the en suite bathroom. Some rooms even feature fully-equipped kitchenettes and private terraces with views. Relaxation and Recreation Unwind by the outdoor swimming pool, sun terrace, or BBQ facilities. Stay active at the on-site fitness center. With Honolulu International Airport and Diamond Head Trail Head in close proximity, your Hawaiian getaway awaits at Coconut Waiki

reviews.pros: The cost
reviews.cons: The drive in

reviews.name: Thomas
reviews.pros: The room was clean good size had a spare bedroom and we got the larger suite which is awesome thank you so much
reviews.cons: The microwave didn't work some of the room doors are a little bit weird to open up and close the beds could have had new mattresses which I would have appreciated the pool could have been warmer and the basement didn't have an elevator which is where the laundry room is located at

reviews.name: Kelly
reviews.pros: I lucked upon this adorable boujie boutique hotel in the heart of everything fun in this area of honolulu and it was amazing! Not only is the hotel facade clean, quaint and adorable BUT the staff couldn't be nicer and I somehow landed a free upgrade in what was a lovely room on the 2nd floor with…
reviews.cons: Nothing

reviews.name: Reamy
reviews.headline: We had a great time at the Coconut Waikiki.
reviews.pros: Staff was very helpful and kind. We felt safe in the environment and had an overall comfortable stay.
reviews.cons: We would've like a smoking area.

reviews.name: Rita
reviews.headline: Safe and convenient location, value for money.
reviews.pros: We absolutely loved the location, and the mountain view. It is a quiet and pleasant lagoon side yet very close to hustle and bustle of Waikiki tourist area, easy walk for dinner, stroll, shops or the public transport. Tea/coffee/water available 24/7 The pop corn in the afternoon was always…
reviews.cons: The pool was very small and towels were not ‘hotel whites’.

reviews.name: Jared
reviews.pros: The staff was awesome, always quick to solve any issue
reviews.cons: The pool needs to have a better entrance and exit for the older person. It's hard to climb in and out on build in stairs, pool hours needs to adjusted

name: Oasis Hotel Waikiki
description: Luxurious Oasis Hotel Waikiki Upscale Amenities : Enjoy a spacious balcony, 42-inch flat-screen TV, and urban loft-style décor in each air-conditioned guest room. Relax in the over-sized deep soaking tub or unwind with the hand-held shower head. Suites even offer a kitchenette for added convenience. Entertainment Options : Start your day with a delicious continental breakfast. For some fun, head to the GS Karaoke Studio for a memorable experience. Serene Retreat : Take a dip in the outdoor swimming pool or explore the outdoor smoking area with koi ponds and a Japanese-style garden for a peaceful escape. Experience luxury and relaxation at Oasis Hotel Waikiki. Book now for an unforgettable st

description: Convenient Location : Situated just a short drive from Waikiki city centre, Airport Honolulu Hotel provides easy access to popular attractions and beautiful beaches. Modern Amenities : Each guest room is equipped with air conditioning, a flat screen TV, microwave, refrigerator, and coffee machine, ensuring a comfortable stay. On-Site Facilities : Guests can enjoy the convenience of an on-site store, outdoor pool, and fitness centre during their stay at Airport Honolulu Hotel. Book your stay at Airport Honolulu Hotel now and experience comfort and convenience during your visit to Waikiki.
importantInfo: Airport Honolulu is committed to providing its guests and associates with a smoke free environment. Smoking tobacco, pipes, vapes, e-cigarettes and marijuana is strictly prohibited within the hotel. By booking through this website, you acknowledge that the hotel has installed smoking detection sensors in its rooms. These sensors enable hotel management to respond to smoking events without disrupting your stay. You hereby agree and consent to the use of such sensor in your room and acknowledge and agree that it is 100% privacy compliant and required by the hotel to ensure a smoke-free stay for all guests. By acknowledging the foregoing, you agree to waive any future claims related to the presence of the sensor in a room you may book. Tampering with the sensor is strictly prohibited.Guests are required to show a photo ID and credit card upon check-in. Please note that all Special Requests are subject to availability and additional charges may apply. Please inform of your expected arrival time in advance. You can use the Special Requests box when booking, or contact the property directly using the contact details in your confirmation. A deposit may be required at the property.

reviews.name: Brandon
reviews.headline: Exceeded expectations. Location is perfect. Nice pool!
reviews.pros: Restaurant and bar with live music and the pool was great! Clean room and clean sheets towels, etc.
reviews.cons: Older hotel, carpets are due for a refresh.

reviews.name: Donna
reviews.headline: Do not plan to book this hotel on our next trip
reviews.pros: No continental free breakfast offered so cannot give a breakfast review. Did like the location to the airport
reviews.cons: The room had a slight smell upon entering, the worst bed/mattress & pillow ever, AC very loud, ducks in the pool.

reviews.name: Theresa
reviews.pros: It was exactly what we required for an overnight stay for an early morning flight.
reviews.cons: The noise!

reviews.name: Thomas
reviews.headline: We had an exceptionally long layover headed to Japan. We needed a single night.
reviews.pros: It was close to the airport so it was convenient. They also had a perfect room for my large family even with late notice.
reviews.cons: The price was a little high. Then they charged a $50 service fee per room and I needed 2 rooms. I got service fee refunded four days later. It was just a little inconvenient since I was traveling further on those days.

reviews.name: Isha
reviews.headline: It works well for overnight layovers.
reviews.pros: The location is really close to the airport, which made catching an early morning flight easy.
reviews.cons: The area of the location seems a bit sketchy.

reviews.name: Rujack
reviews.headline: Great
reviews.pros: It clean, close, safe place
reviews.cons: Ok

reviews.name: Marsilinou
reviews.pros: Overall average experience

reviews.name: Keri
reviews.pros: Incredible!! I am so happy I chose Wayfinder. It was perfect from check in to check out. Such a special property. Everyone is so helpful and friendly. Rooms are beautiful!! Views are amazing! The pool is amazing. Clean and quiet. Poolside bar has delicious drinks and food. Very safe area if you are…

reviews.name: Lydia
reviews.pros: Great stay at the Wayfinder Waikiki. I spent four nights here and it's a good base for exploring the area. The 2x bed double room was a good size for two people. Its a little on the smaller side but great attention paid to decor, finishing touches, lighting etc. Staff were always responsive, and I…

reviews.name: Lorelei
reviews.pros: Property is within walking distance within walking distance to beach and shopping.

reviews.name: Brenda
reviews.pros: Walkable distance from the beach, the canal, the zoo and many dining options. It is next to a busy main road and cars driving by do make it a bit noisy. Other than that the property itself is clean with modern beach decor.

reviews.name: Silvia
reviews.pros: The room was perfect and clean. Interior of the hotel is very pretty and gives a lot of that Hawaii vibe. Staff was very friendly and always helpful. Pool was amazing too. Very close to Waikiki beach and the main street, literally 3-4 min walk. Loved everything about staying in that hotel!

name: Ka Laʻi Waikiki Beach, LXR Hotels & Resorts
description: Indulge in the luxury of Ka Laʻi Waikiki Beach, LXR Hotels & Resorts, where exceptional hospitality meets paradise just moments from Waikiki Beach. Full-Service Spa Rejuvenate your senses at our full-service spa, offering a range of soothing massages, revitalizing body treatments, and refreshing facials designed to pamper you and enhance your relaxation. Dining & Refreshments Savor delightful meals at our poolside restaurant, featuring alfresco dining. For ultimate convenience, indulge in 24-hour room service or enjoy your favorite drink at the poolside bar while soaking up the sun. Elegant Accommodations Retreat to one of our 462 guest rooms, complete with pillowtop beds, down comfo
importantInfo: Pool access available from 6:00 AM to 10:00 PM. Reservations are required for massage services and spa treatments. Reservations can be made by contacting the resort prior to arrival, using the contact information on the booking confirmation. One child 17 years old or younger stays free when occupying the parent or guardian's room, using existing bedding. Only registered guests are allowed in the guestrooms. Guests can arrange to bring pets by contacting the property directly, using the contact information on the booking confirmation (surcharges apply and can be found in the Fees section). Cashless payment methods are available for all transactions. Contactless check-out is available. This property welcomes guests of all sexual orientations and gender identities (LGBTQ+ friendly).

reviews.name: Lauren
reviews.headline: Excellent Stay in a Great Location With All Your Needs Met
reviews.pros: This was a return visit from 10 years ago, and the standard of the hotel was still excellent. The rooms are clean, and having a kitchenette is a bonus, which we made use of and needed. Loved the partial view of the ocean with a balcony, and the bathroom was roomy with everything you need. The…
reviews.cons: The hotel is going through a renovation, so a few facilities are impacted, but this did not affect our stay. Look forward to coming back when the hotel is completed. There was not much else we didn't like.

reviews.name: NANA
reviews.pros: Spacious and good location
reviews.cons: Under construction but didn’t notify me at all, overpriced

reviews.name: Larry
reviews.pros: The Upgrade

reviews.name: fdrone
reviews.headline: ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐ An Exceptional 25th Anniversary Stay at Ka La‘i Waikīkī Beach, LXR Hotels & Resorts
reviews.pros: My wife and I recently stayed at Ka La‘i Waikīkī Beach, LXR Hotels & Resorts while celebrating our 25th Wedding Anniversary, and our son joined us as we celebrated his 21st birthday. From the moment we arrived, we were welcomed with genuine warmth, hospitality, and aloha spirit. We would like to…

reviews.name: rayeR5943DU
reviews.headline: Hospitality at its finest
reviews.pros: My experience has been exceptional from start to finish. The front desk, housekeeping, maintenance, valet, concierge, and food & beverage teams have all been incredibly guest-service oriented, professional, and attentive. Everyone consistently created a welcoming atmosphere, making my stay feel…

reviews.name: Megan
reviews.headline: Would definitely stay again.
reviews.pros: Hotel was nice and clean. We were very impressed with how friendly and accommodating the staff was.

name: The Laylow Waikiki, Autograph Collection
facilities: Staff adhere to local safety protocols
description: Mid-Century Modern Oasis Experience the vibrant charm of The Laylow, Autograph Collection, just steps away from Waikiki Beach. Indulge in a welcome amenity and unwind in rooms equipped with smart TVs and WiFi. Island-Inspired Amenities Relax by the swimming pool, savor delicious meals at the on-site restaurant, and plan your adventures at the activity desk. Enjoy nightly entertainment and complimentary shaved Hawaiian ice poolside. Ideal Location Immerse yourself in the heart of Waikiki, with easy access to the Royal Hawaiian Center, Diamond Head Crater Hike, and the bustling International Market Place. With Honolulu International Airport just a short drive away, your Hawaiian getaway awaits
importantInfo: Please note that a maximum of 1 pet is allowed per room. Please contact property in advance for pet charges and restrictions. Please note that pet deposit is nonrefundable. There is an additional person charge. Contact the property for more details. The daily destination fee collected at the property includes: - Nightly live entertainment - Shaved ice - Ukulele lessons - E Komo Mai welcome basket - High-speed WiFi access - Arts and crafts classes (offered at 10:00 on Saturdays, Tuesdays and Thursdays) - Ti Leaf Kupee workshop (every Monday at 10:00) - Orchid Lei making (Sundays and Fridays at 10:00) - Daily poolside delights - Cruiser bicycles - Complimentary pool and beach Towels - 24-Hour fitness center accessGuests are required to show a photo ID and credit card upon check-in. Please note that all Special Requests are subject to availability and additional charges may apply. In the event of an early departure, the property will charge you the full amount for your stay. A deposit may be required at the property.

policies.name: Children and extra bed policy
policies.description: Children of any age are allowed. Children up to and including 2 years old stay for free when using an available cot. Children up to and including 17 years old stay for free when using an existing bed. You haven't added any extra beds. Any type of extra bed or child's cot/crib is upon request and needs to be confirmed by management.

policies.name: Internet
policies.description: WiFi is available in the hotel rooms and charges are applicable.

policies.name: Pets
policies.description: Pets are allowed. Charges may be applicable.

policies.name: Groups
policies.description: When booking more than 10 rooms, different policies and additional supplements may apply.

policies.name: Parking
policies.description: Private parking is possible on site (reservation is not needed) and costs USD 60 per day.

reviews.pros: The staff was excellent and the rooms were nice. The room cleaning crew did an excellent job each day in ensuring fresh towels were left and the bed was made.
reviews.cons: The valet parking pricing is quite high if you rent a car.

reviews.cons: The breakfast and the birthday amenities I asked for my wife that was confirmed never came. It was on the 3may.

Bar and food service is excellent (call out to Jerrod and Brenda and Cassidy) and the menu and quality of food superb. Rooms are comfortable and lots of storage space and little welcome basket of fun treasures. Top class…

name: Ramada Plaza by Wyndham Waikiki
facilities: Staff adhere to local safety protocols
Cleaning standards that are effective against Coronavirus
Hand sanitizer in guest room and key areas
Guests can opt-out any cleaning services during stay
Shared stationery like menus, pens are removed
Property cleaned by professional cleaning companies

reviews.headline: Overall, the Ramada offered excellent value, a fantastic location, and a comfortable stay for our family, making our vac

reviews.name: Gainer
reviews.headline: Good but different than advertised
reviews.pros: Clean, friendly staff, let us keep to ourselves, not crowded

reviews.name: Jeanine

reviews.cons: Noise. Smell in the hallway that made me cough. Musty

reviews.name: Heidi

name: Romer House Waikiki
description: Discover the ultimate Hawaiian getaway at Romer House Waikiki, where comfort meets paradise! Relaxation & Recreation Dive into bliss at our outdoor pool, the perfect spot to unwind under the sun. Enjoy refreshing beverages from our poolside bar while you soak in the laid-back atmosphere of Waikiki. Gourmet Dining Savor delightful culinary experiences at Izakaya 855-ALOHA, offering mouthwatering local dishes and breakfast options daily. Each meal is a chance to indulge your taste buds in true Hawaiian style. Modern Comforts Retreat to one of our 179 air-conditioned rooms, featuring Smart TVs and luxurious pillowtop beds. Stay connected with complimentary wireless internet and enjoy well-a
importantInfo: Pool access available from 8:00 AM to 10:00 PM. Up to 5 children 17 years old and younger stay free when occupying the parent or guardian's room, using existing bedding. Only registered guests are allowed in the guestrooms. The property has connecting/adjoining rooms, which are subject to availability and can be requested by contacting the property using the number on the booking confirmation. This property welcomes guests of all sexual orientations and gender identities (LGBTQ+ friendly).

reviews.name: Amanda
reviews.headline: Do not be deceived
reviews.pros: Location is great
reviews.cons: Apparently the rooms are individually owned and then rendered by the hotel. Which means there is no certainty you will get the room or anything like the room that is used in the hotel advertising.

reviews.name: Raymond
reviews.headline: The place to stay for business or a get away.
reviews.pros: Overall I love staying at this Hotel! The view from the higher floors is AMAZING! The space afforded in the one-bedroom suites make you feel like a king. And the beds make you feel just as good. The location is convenient to the places I need to get to and has plenty of restaurants to eat at close…
reviews.cons: Sometimes the price fluctuates. But still worth it for the stay. Book early!

reviews.name: Robert
reviews.headline: Much different than staying in Waikiki, where we stayed many times.
reviews.pros: Great view from 31st floor. Staff was very helpful with luggage when we arrive early and quickly fixing small glitches with TV remote and safe.
reviews.cons: I expected that parking was included in the cost. Also we did not like getting up & down to 8th floor parking. Room was not cleaned during our 4 day stay; I was told it would be cleaned on the 3rd day.

reviews.name: PhoebeBlue
reviews.pros: The bathtub and the view and very very comfy bed Spacious with separate room and desk to work in very very close to amenities bus routes and food
reviews.cons: The room is a bit dated but it was spacious the internet kept dropping out but at least a half an hour taxi ride or longer on public transport to Waikiki

reviews.name: Akoto
reviews.headline: Very enjoyable stay
reviews.pros: We loved the location, the facilities and especially the bed which was very comfortable to sleep on. Also we love the late check out as well.
reviews.cons: Nothing

reviews.name: Danilo
reviews.headline: Refreshing, close to everything. Public transport is very convenient.
reviews.pros: Location, the room and amenities.
reviews.cons: None

description: Luxurious Accommodations The Marriott's Ko Olina Beach Club offers spacious rooms with stunning ocean or mountain views, fully equipped kitchens, and modern amenities like a washing machine and dryer. Dining and Entertainment Indulge in American cuisine at Longboards Bar & Grill or experience the vibrant Fia Fia Polynesian Dinner Show for a taste of local culture and entertainment. Relaxation and Recreation Unwind at the Spa by the Sea or take a dip in one of the 3 outdoor pools surrounded by lush palm trees. With 7 hot tubs and a state-of-the-art fitness center, guests can rejuvenate and stay active during their stay. Experience luxury and comfort at Marriott's Ko Olina Beach Club - boo

reviews.name: Susan
reviews.headline: Stay was very good.
reviews.pros: Beautiful setting! Very clean too. You wouldn’t even have to leave the property.
reviews.cons: They charged my credit card after the room was paid when booked and tried to collect again at checkout.

reviews.name: Dona
reviews.headline: The setting was beautiful, the room not so much.
reviews.pros: The beach was wonderful and safe. I appreciated a shower room since our room wasn't ready yet. It was very enjoyable eating dinner next to the ocean and listening to the musician at Longboards. The different pools were beautiful but not heated and it was cold the first of March.
reviews.cons: We didn't have an ocean view so the room was dark and dated. For the price, there should have been complimentary water. This was the only resort ot of 5 that we stayed at that didn't offer anything.

reviews.name: Mir
reviews.headline: Not many entertainments
reviews.pros: It is clean
reviews.cons: Room keys did not work for half a day. Not very good restaurants on the site.

reviews.name: Steven
reviews.pros: Beautiful location and very well maintained.
reviews.cons: No real area to be on the beach on the ocean. Just at the lagoon that often had lots of seaweed or something floating on top. Best pool area was also closed 5 of the 9 nights we stayed there .

reviews.name: Max
reviews.headline: The peaceful view if you have ocean front, is wonderful. The check in process is tedious.
reviews.pros: Ocean front view. Good beds. Kids loved the pool.
reviews.cons: The check in process is always long and drawn out. I hate it. It seems you could be a great deal more efficient and consolidate the procedures. Then a day later we get a call to come get discount coupons at a welcome desk. We skipped it. Just include it all at check in!!!

reviews.name: Irene
reviews.pros: Everything was perfect and beautiful
reviews.cons: N/a

Family-Friendly Amenities : Enjoy a children's playground and activities for the whole family to make lasting memories. Convenience at Your Fingertips : With room service, 24-hour front desk, and free WiFi, we ensure your stay is stress-free. Book now and indulge in a magical stay at Aulani, A Disney Resort And Spa.

reviews.name: F6752RCjoannea
reviews.headline: Dreaming of the old days
reviews.pros: This is our 7th trip to Aulani. We have been visiting since the grand opening in 2011. We are not DVC owners. I do regret not buying during our first visit but I didn’t really see myself coming back to the same place so frequently. That was not our traveling style back then but ko olina has been…

reviews.name: johndoesquared
reviews.headline: Not what it used to be.
reviews.pros: We have been to Disney Aulani 3 previous times, this was the worst. For context, we have been to disneyland hotel, hotel Californian, disneyland, disney world, disney sea, disney tokyo, disney Paris, and multiple Disney cruises. Aulani just isn't worth it anymore. They don't put the effort in to…

reviews.name: jeffwY6393WM
reviews.headline: Poor Chair Policy - Ruins the fun
reviews.pros: The place was nice overall. But the pool seating was absolutely terrible, and it ruined a lot of the experience. They "Claim" to enforce a 1 hour chair policy, but in my entire week there I never saw it enforced. There should be no reason people can hold chairs all day and not be there. This should…

reviews.name: Zayd84
reviews.headline: Over rated
reviews.pros: The main issue we had was there not being any room service available through out the resort. Given the insanely high price for a room at this resort, room service should be a given. You’re on vacation with family and little kids and may not always be able to go down to get food. Also, only…

reviews.name: Curiosity20882321741
reviews.headline: Great Cast Members, Terrible Resort Management
reviews.pros: Honestly, for $1,000 a night, I expected way more than this. Aulani is basically a lesson in corporate greed disguised as "magic." The service is just poor. You’re paying a premium, but they don’t even clean your room every day—only every other day. It’s ridiculous to be tripping over trash or…

reviews.name: toddtM6190TT
reviews.headline: The Pool Chair saga
reviews.pros: Great staff, good room and nice amenities. My only complaint is pool chairs. This is Disney folks and with their creative team they should be able to come up with a solution to pool chairs. 80% are unused but “saved”. I shouldn’t have to spend this money for a week and literally never have a pair…

reviews.name: Baltazar
reviews.headline: Superb
reviews.pros: Gorgeous view. Very spacious. Clean. Kitchen pretty well stocked. Pools are awesome and beach just steps away from pool also Gorgeous and relaxing, not crowded and you can see plenty of fish.
reviews.cons: Only two rolls of toilet paper per bathroom for 7nights for 7 people. Not enough and for the cost to rent the property pretty disappointing. Same for the paper towels only 2 rolls provided.

reviews.name: Patty
reviews.headline: I would stay here again in a heartbeat. Absolutely loved it.
reviews.pros: Stunning views, spacious, clean and comfortable
reviews.cons: I had no complaints

reviews.name: Mamaritt
reviews.headline: Beautiful location
reviews.pros: Beautifully maintained facilities, friendly staff. Plenty of Pool chairs and not crowded like the Disney resort. Parking spots were easy to access and we liked the semi-private elevators. Apartment is quiet and set back from the street, was clean and had adequate kitchen equipment for cooking.
reviews.cons: Description says three bathrooms, but it is really two full bathrooms with showers, and a half bath with just a toilet and sink. It would be very crowded with eight people in this apartment, unless two are infants. The room with twin beds is very small, and there is no room for cots in the living…

reviews.name: Toshi
reviews.headline: Awesome and great hosts.
reviews.pros: It's a beautiful penthouse property with outstanding ocean view from a luxurious lanai. Private entrance with easy access to the parking. Highly recommended for a party of four or more.
reviews.cons: I ended up renting snorkeling gears for my kids then realized there was a closet full of boogie boards, masks, fins, and beach toys. The host supposedly described the closet during the initial orientation, but I was parking at the time and the rest of the family do not understand English thereby…

reviews.name: Kristina
reviews.pros: Beachfront and whole family was able to stay together. Restaurants nearby.

reviews.name: Holly
reviews.headline: Great for a family get together!!
reviews.pros: I loved being so close to the beach!
reviews.cons: It was hard being so far from Manoa/Honolulu

reviews.name: Darla
reviews.headline: An extended family with 7 people, 5 adults and 2 children really enjoyed the stay.
reviews.pros: The location was spectacular. We had a lovely view of the ocean and lagoon from the lanai. Just a short walk to the pools and or beach. There was a little beach bar on premise by the pool. Drinks were good but, spendy. Some food was also available but we did not try it.
reviews.cons: We booked for 7 guests but, only 4 beds available in the 3 bedrooms. A king bed in one bedroom, queen bed in second bedroom and 2 twin beds in the third bedroom. There was a hide a bed in the living room but. we chose not to utilize it. Was under the impression from the description that there would…

reviews.name: Jose
reviews.headline: We enjoy all the amenities and pool areas. We had a great time and experience and will definitely return to your propert
reviews.pros: The property is very well kept and clean and beautiful . We loved the easy access to the property and the added security to only access with key card. The staff, especially Ms. Lynn, are extremely friendly and very accommodating. The rooms are very well equipped. We had a wonderful vacation.
reviews.cons: Mirrors in the bedrooms would make it easier for the bathrooms to become accessible sooner when several guests are getting ready to go out.

reviews.name: John
reviews.headline: Beautiful view, spacious tastefully furnished unit - close to Kapolei.
reviews.pros: Beautiful view of the sunset over lagoon number 2 from the lanai. Spacious. On the "quiet" (nonpool) side of the building. Walk in master closet. Short stroll to the lagoon. Restaurants and market within walking distance. The up and coming town of Kapolei is nearby (complete with Island Vintage…
reviews.cons: Some mechanical problems, likely unique to our visit: master bathtub drain mechanism got stuck in closed position. Washing machine malfunction required daily resetting of circuit breaker. Watch that westbound traffic from 4 pm.

reviews.name: Ladislas
reviews.headline: Perfect!
reviews.pros: Our place was clean, spacious, with a partial view of the ocean. It was perfect for our family . The area was full of things to do and conveniently located to a grocery store, restaurants and some cute boutiques. Target is 10 min from the property which we found to have better prices on essentials…
reviews.cons: The parking space was tight and hard to get in and out of. That’s a minor inconvenience compared to all the positives.
